     3	module Spree
     4	  module Stock
     5	    class AvailabilityValidator < ActiveModel::Validator
     6	      def validate(line_item)
     7	        if is_valid?(line_item)
     8	          true
     9	        else
    10	          variant = line_item.variant
    11	          display_name = variant.name.to_s
    12	          display_name += %{ (#{variant.options_text})} unless variant.options_text.blank?
    13	
    14	          line_item.errors.add(:quantity, I18n.t(
    15	            "spree.selected_quantity_not_available",
    16	            item: display_name.inspect
    17	          ))
    18	          false
    19	        end
    20	      end
    21	
    22	      private
    23	
    24	      def is_valid?(line_item)
    25	        if line_item.inventory_units.empty?
    26	          Spree::Config.stock.quantifier_class.new(line_item.variant).can_supply?(line_item.quantity)
    27	        else
    28	          quantity_by_stock_location_id = line_item.inventory_units.pending.joins(:shipment).group(:stock_location_id).count
    29	          quantity_by_stock_location_id.all? do |stock_location_id, quantity|
    30	            Spree::Config.stock.quantifier_class.new(line_item.variant, stock_location_id).can_supply?(quantity)
    31	          end
    32	        end
    33	      end
    34	    end
    35	  end
    36	end

## core/app/models/spree/stock/estimator.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Stock
     5	    class Estimator
     6	      class ShipmentRequired < StandardError; end
     7	      class OrderRequired < StandardError; end
     8	
     9	      # Estimate the shipping rates for a package.
    10	      #
    11	      # @param package [Spree::Stock::Package] the package to be shipped
    12	      # @param frontend_only [Boolean] restricts the shipping methods to only
    13	      #   those marked frontend if truthy
    14	      # @return [Array<Spree::ShippingRate>] the shipping rates sorted by
    15	      #   descending cost, with the least costly marked "selected"
    16	      def shipping_rates(package, frontend_only = true)
    17	        raise ShipmentRequired if package.shipment.nil?
    18	        raise OrderRequired if package.shipment.order.nil?
    19	
    20	        rates = calculate_shipping_rates(package)
    21	        rates.select! { |rate| rate.shipping_method.available_to_users? } if frontend_only
    22	        choose_default_shipping_rate(rates)
    23	        Spree::Config.shipping_rate_sorter_class.new(rates).sort
    24	      end
    25	
    26	      private
    27	
    28	      def choose_default_shipping_rate(shipping_rates)
    29	        unless shipping_rates.empty?
    30	          default_shipping_rate = Spree::Config.shipping_rate_selector_class.new(shipping_rates).find_default
    31	          default_shipping_rate.selected = true
    32	        end
    33	      end
    34	
    35	      def calculate_shipping_rates(package)
    36	        tax_calculator_class = Spree::Config.shipping_rate_tax_calculator_class
    37	        tax_calculator = tax_calculator_class.new(package.shipment.order)
    38	        shipping_methods(package).map do |shipping_method|
    39	          cost = shipping_method.calculator.compute(package)
    40	          if cost
    41	            rate = shipping_method.shipping_rates.new(
    42	              cost:,
    43	              shipment: package.shipment
    44	            )
    45	            tax_calculator.calculate(rate).each do |tax|
    46	              rate.taxes.new(
    47	                amount: tax.amount,
    48	                tax_rate: tax.tax_rate
    49	              )
    50	            end
    51	            rate
    52	          end
    53	        end.compact
    54	      end
    55	
    56	      def shipping_methods(package)
    57	        package.shipping_methods
    58	          .available_to_store(package.shipment.order.store)
    59	          .available_for_address(package.shipment.order.ship_address)
    60	          .includes(:calculator)
    61	          .to_a
    62	          .select do |ship_method|
    63	            calculator = ship_method.calculator
    64	            calculator.available?(package) &&
    65	              (calculator.preferences[:currency].blank? ||
    66	               calculator.preferences[:currency] == package.shipment.order.currency)
    67	        end
    68	      end
    69	    end
    70	  end
    71	end

## core/app/models/spree/stock/package.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Stock
     5	    class Package
     6	      attr_reader :stock_location, :contents
     7	      attr_accessor :shipment
     8	
     9	      # @param stock_location [Spree::StockLocation] the stock location this package originates from
    10	      # @param contents [Array<Spree::Stock::ContentItem>] the contents of this package
    11	      def initialize(stock_location, contents = [])
    12	        @stock_location = stock_location
    13	        @contents = contents
    14	      end
    15	
    16	      # Adds an inventory unit to this package.
    17	      #
    18	      # @param inventory_unit [Spree::InventoryUnit] an inventory unit to be
    19	      #   added to this package
    20	      # @param state [:on_hand, :backordered] the state of the item to be
    21	      #   added to this package
    22	      def add(inventory_unit, state = :on_hand)
    23	        contents << ContentItem.new(inventory_unit, state) unless find_item(inventory_unit)
    24	      end
    25	
    26	      # Adds multiple inventory units to this package.
    27	      #
    28	      # @param inventory_units [Array<Spree::InventoryUnit>] a collection of
    29	      #   inventory units to be added to this package
    30	      # @param state [:on_hand, :backordered] the state of the items to be
    31	      #   added to this package
    32	      def add_multiple(inventory_units, state = :on_hand)
    33	        inventory_units.each { |inventory_unit| add(inventory_unit, state) }
    34	      end
    35	
    36	      # Removes a given inventory unit from this package.
    37	      #
    38	      # @param inventory_unit [Spree::InventoryUnit] the inventory unit to be
    39	      #   removed from this package
    40	      def remove(inventory_unit)
    41	        item = find_item(inventory_unit)
    42	        @contents -= [item] if item
    43	      end
    44	
    45	      # @return [Spree::Order] the order associated with this package
    46	      def order
    47	        # Fix regression that removed package.order.
    48	        # Find it dynamically through an inventory_unit.
    49	        contents.detect { |item| !!item.try(:line_item).try(:order) }.try(:line_item).try(:order)
    50	      end
    51	
    52	      # @return [Float] the summed weight of the contents of this package
    53	      def weight
    54	        contents.sum(&:weight)
    55	      end
    56	
    57	      # @return [Array<Spree::Stock::ContentItem>] the content items in this
    58	      #   package which are on hand
    59	      def on_hand
    60	        contents.select(&:on_hand?)
    61	      end
    62	
    63	      # @return [Array<Spree::Stock::ContentItem>] the content items in this
    64	      #   package which are backordered
    65	      def backordered
    66	        contents.select(&:backordered?)
    67	      end
    68	
    69	      # Find a content item in this package by inventory unit and optionally
    70	      # state.
    71	      #
    72	      # @param inventory_unit [Spree::InventoryUnit] the desired inventory
    73	      #   unit
    74	      # @param state [:backordered, :on_hand, nil] the state of the desired
    75	      #   content item, or nil for any state
    76	      def find_item(inventory_unit, state = nil)
    77	        contents.detect do |item|
    78	          item.inventory_unit == inventory_unit &&
    79	            (!state || item.state.to_s == state.to_s)
    80	        end
    81	      end
    82	
    83	      # @param state [:backordered, :on_hand, nil] the state of the content
    84	      #   items of which we want the quantity, or nil for the full quantity
    85	      # @return [Fixnum] the number of inventory units in the package,
    86	      #   counting only those in the given state if it was specified
    87	      def quantity(state = nil)
    88	        matched_contents = state.nil? ? contents : contents.select { |content| content.state.to_s == state.to_s }
    89	        matched_contents.sum(&:quantity)
    90	      end
    91	
    92	      # @return [Boolean] true if there are no inventory units in this
    93	      #   package
    94	      def empty?
    95	        quantity == 0
    96	      end
    97	
    98	      # @return [String] the currency of the order this package belongs to
    99	      def currency
   100	        order.currency
   101	      end
   102	
   103	      # @return [Array<Spree::ShippingCategory>] the shipping categories of the
   104	      #   variants in this package
   105	      def shipping_categories
   106	        Spree::ShippingCategory.where(id: shipping_category_ids)
   107	      end
   108	
   109	      # @return [ActiveRecord::Relation] the [Spree::ShippingMethod]s available
   110	      #   for this pacakge based on the stock location and shipping categories.
   111	      def shipping_methods
   112	        Spree::ShippingMethod
   113	          .with_all_shipping_category_ids(shipping_category_ids)
   114	          .available_in_stock_location(stock_location)
   115	      end
   116	
   117	      # @return [Spree::Shipment] a new shipment containing this package's
   118	      #   inventory units, with the appropriate shipping rates and associated
   119	      #   with the correct stock location
   120	      def to_shipment
   121	        # At this point we should only have one content item per inventory unit
   122	        # across the entire set of inventory units to be shipped, which has
   123	        # been taken care of by the Prioritizer
   124	        contents.each { |content_item| content_item.inventory_unit.state = content_item.state.to_s }
   125	
   126	        Spree::Shipment.new(
   127	          order:,
   128	          stock_location:,
   129	          inventory_units: contents.map(&:inventory_unit)
   130	        )
   131	      end
   132	
   133	      private
   134	
   135	      # @return [Array<Fixnum>] the unique ids of all shipping categories of
   136	      #   variants in this package
   137	      def shipping_category_ids
   138	        contents.map { |item| item.variant.shipping_category_id }.compact.uniq
   139	      end
   140	    end
   141	  end
   142	end

1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	# This class represents all of the actions one can take to modify an Order after it is complete
     4	class Spree::OrderCancellations
     5	  extend ActiveModel::Translation
     6	
     7	  # If you need to message a third party service when an item is canceled then
     8	  # set short_ship_tax_notifier to an object that responds to:
     9	  #     #call(unit_cancels)
    10	  class_attribute :short_ship_tax_notifier
    11	
    12	  class << self
    13	    def send_cancellation_mailer=(value)
    14	      @send_cancellation_mailer = value
    15	
    16	      unless value
    17	        Spree.deprecator.warn "Using the `:send_cancellation_mailer` class " \
    18	          "attribute is deprecated in favor of including or omitting the " \
    19	          "`Spree::OrderInventoryCancellationMailerSubscriber` from " \
    20	          "`Spree::Config.environment.subscribers` in an initializer."
    21	      end
    22	    end
    23	
    24	    def send_cancellation_mailer
    25	      @send_cancellation_mailer || @send_cancellation_mailer.nil?
    26	    end
    27	  end
    28	
    29	  def initialize(order)
    30	    @order = order
    31	  end
    32	
    33	  # Marks inventory units short shipped. Adjusts the order based on the value of the inventory.
    34	  # Sends an email to the customer about what inventory has been short shipped.
    35	  #
    36	  # @api public
    37	  #
    38	  # @param [Array<InventoryUnit>] inventory_units the inventory units to be short shipped
    39	  # @param [Spree.user_class] created_by the system or person that is short shipping the inventory unit
    40	  #
    41	  # @return [Array<UnitCancel>] the units that have been canceled due to short shipping
    42	  def short_ship(inventory_units, created_by: nil)
    43	    if inventory_units.map(&:order_id).uniq != [@order.id]
    44	      raise ArgumentError, "Not all inventory units belong to this order"
    45	    end
    46	
    47	    unit_cancels = []
    48	
    49	    Spree::OrderMutex.with_lock!(@order) do
    50	      Spree::InventoryUnit.transaction do
    51	        inventory_units.each do |iu|
    52	          unit_cancels << short_ship_unit(iu, created_by:)
    53	        end
    54	      end
    55	
    56	      @order.recalculate
    57	
    58	      short_ship_tax_notifier&.call(unit_cancels)
    59	    end
    60	
    61	    Spree::Bus.publish(:order_short_shipped, order: @order, inventory_units:)
    62	    unit_cancels
    63	  end
    64	
    65	  # Marks inventory unit canceled. Optionally allows specifying the reason why and who is performing the action.
    66	  #
    67	  # @api public
    68	  #
    69	  # @param [InventoryUnit] inventory_unit the inventory unit to be canceled
    70	  # @param [String] reason the reason that you are canceling the inventory unit
    71	  # @param [Spree.user_class] created_by the system or person that is canceling the inventory unit
    72	  #
    73	  # @return [UnitCancel] the unit that has been canceled
    74	  def cancel_unit(inventory_unit, reason: Spree::UnitCancel::DEFAULT_REASON, created_by: nil)
    75	    unit_cancel = nil
    76	
    77	    Spree::OrderMutex.with_lock!(@order) do
    78	      unit_cancel = Spree::UnitCancel.create!(
    79	        inventory_unit:,
    80	        reason:,
    81	        created_by:
    82	      )
    83	
    84	      inventory_unit.cancel!
    85	    end
    86	
    87	    unit_cancel
    88	  end
    89	
    90	  # Reimburses inventory units due to cancellation.
    91	  #
    92	  # @api public
    93	  # @param [Array<InventoryUnit>] inventory_units the inventory units to be reimbursed
    94	  # @param [Spree.user_class] created_by the user that is performing this action
    95	  # @return [Reimbursement] the reimbursement for inventory being canceled
    96	  def reimburse_units(inventory_units, created_by:)
    97	    reimbursement = nil
    98	
    99	    Spree::OrderMutex.with_lock!(@order) do
   100	      return_items = inventory_units.map(&:current_or_new_return_item)
   101	      reimbursement = Spree::Reimbursement.new(order: @order, return_items:)
   102	      reimbursement.return_all(created_by:)
   103	    end
   104	
   105	    reimbursement
   106	  end
   107	
   108	  private
   109	
   110	  def short_ship_unit(inventory_unit, created_by: nil)
   111	    unit_cancel = Spree::UnitCancel.create!(
   112	      inventory_unit:,
   113	      reason: Spree::UnitCancel::SHORT_SHIP,
   114	      created_by:
   115	    )
   116	    unit_cancel.adjust!
   117	    inventory_unit.cancel!
   118	
   119	    unit_cancel
   120	  end
   121	end

## core/app/models/spree/order_mutex.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  class OrderMutex < Spree::Base
     5	    class LockFailed < StandardError; end
     6	
     7	    belongs_to :order, class_name: "Spree::Order", optional: true
     8	
     9	    scope :expired, -> { where(arel_table[:created_at].lteq(Spree::Config[:order_mutex_max_age].seconds.ago)) }
    10	
    11	    class << self
    12	      # Obtain a lock on an order, execute the supplied block and then release the lock.
    13	      # Raise a LockFailed exception immediately if we cannot obtain the lock.
    14	      # We raise instead of blocking to avoid tying up multiple server processes waiting for the lock.
    15	      def with_lock!(order)
    16	        raise ArgumentError, "order must be supplied" if order.nil?
    17	
    18	        # limit the maximum lock time just in case a lock is somehow left in place accidentally
    19	        expired.where(order:).delete_all
    20	
    21	        begin
    22	          order_mutex = create!(order:)
    23	        rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotUnique
    24	          error = LockFailed.new("Could not obtain lock on order #{order.id}")
    25	          logger.error error.inspect
    26	          raise error
    27	        end
    28	
    29	        yield
    30	      ensure
    31	        order_mutex&.destroy
    32	      end
    33	    end
    34	  end
    35	end

## core/app/models/spree/order_taxation.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  # Relatively simple class used to apply a {Spree::Tax::OrderTax} to a
     5	  # {Spree::Order}.
     6	  #
     7	  # This class will create or update adjustments on the taxed items and remove
     8	  # any now inapplicable tax adjustments from the order.
     9	  class OrderTaxation
    10	    # Create a new order taxation.
    11	    #
    12	    # @param [Spree::Order] order the order to apply taxes to
    13	    # @return [Spree::OrderTaxation] a {Spree::OrderTaxation} object
    14	    def initialize(order)
    15	      @order = order
    16	    end
    17	
    18	    # Apply taxes to the order.
    19	    #
    20	    # This method will create or update adjustments on the order and all line
    21	    # items and shipments in the order to reflect the appropriate taxes passed
    22	    # in. It will also remove any now inapplicable tax adjustments.
    23	    #
    24	    # @param [Spree::Tax::OrderTax] taxes the taxes to apply to the order
    25	    # @return [void]
    26	    def apply(taxes)
    27	      update_adjustments(@order, taxes.order_taxes) if taxes.order_taxes
    28	
    29	      @order.line_items.each do |item|
    30	        taxed_items = taxes.line_item_taxes.select { |element| element.item_id == item.id }
    31	        item.tax_category_id = item.variant_tax_category_id
    32	        update_adjustments(item, taxed_items)
    33	      end
    34	
    35	      @order.shipments.each do |item|
    36	        taxed_items = taxes.shipment_taxes.select { |element| element.item_id == item.id }
    37	        update_adjustments(item, taxed_items)
    38	      end
    39	    end
    40	
    41	    private
    42	
    43	    # Walk through the taxes for an item and update adjustments for it. Once
    44	    # all of the taxes have been added as adjustments, remove any old tax
    45	    # adjustments that weren't touched.
    46	    #
    47	    # @private
    48	    # @param [#adjustments] item a {Spree::LineItem} or {Spree::Shipment}
    49	    # @param [Array<Spree::Tax::ItemTax>] taxed_items a list of calculated taxes for an item
    50	    # @return [void]
    51	    def update_adjustments(item, taxed_items)
    52	      tax_adjustments = item.adjustments.select(&:tax?)
    53	
    54	      active_adjustments = taxed_items.map do |tax_item|
    55	        update_adjustment(item, tax_item)
    56	      end
    57	
    58	      # Remove any tax adjustments tied to rates which no longer match.
    59	      unmatched_adjustments = tax_adjustments - active_adjustments
    60	      unmatched_adjustments.each(&:mark_for_destruction)
    61	    end
    62	
    63	    # Update or create a new tax adjustment on an item.
    64	    #
    65	    # @private
    66	    # @param [#adjustments] item a {Spree::LineItem} or {Spree::Shipment}
    67	    # @param [Spree::Tax::ItemTax] tax_item calculated taxes for an item
    68	    # @return [Spree::Adjustment] the created or updated tax adjustment
    69	    def update_adjustment(item, tax_item)
    70	      tax_adjustment = item.adjustments.detect do |adjustment|
    71	        adjustment.source == tax_item.tax_rate
    72	      end
    73	
    74	      tax_adjustment ||= item.adjustments.new(
    75	        source: tax_item.tax_rate,
    76	        order_id: item.is_a?(Spree::Order) ? item.id : item.order_id,
    77	        label: tax_item.label,
    78	        included: tax_item.included_in_price
    79	      )
    80	
    81	      tax_adjustment.amount = tax_item.amount
    82	      tax_adjustment
    83	    end
    84	  end
    85	end

## core/app/models/spree/calculator.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  class Calculator < Spree::Base
     5	    include Spree::Preferences::Persistable
     6	
     7	    belongs_to :calculable, polymorphic: true, optional: true
     8	
     9	    # Computes an amount based on the calculable and the computable parameter.
    10	    #
    11	    # This method dynamically calls a compute_<computable> method based on the class
    12	    # of the computable parameter. Concrete calculator classes must implement the
    13	    # appropriate compute method for each computable type they support.
    14	    #
    15	    # For example, if the computable is a Spree::LineItem, this will call
    16	    # compute_line_item(computable, ...). If the computable is a Spree::Order,
    17	    # it will call compute_order(computable, ...).
    18	    #
    19	    # @param computable [Object] The object to compute the amount for (e.g.,
    20	    #                            Spree::LineItem, Spree::Order, Spree::Shipment,
    21	    #                            Spree::ShippingRate)
    22	    # @param ... [args, kwargs] Additional arguments passed to the specific compute method
    23	    #
    24	    # @return [BigDecimal, Numeric] The computed amount
    25	    #
    26	    # @raise [NotImplementedError] If the calculator doesn't implement the required compute method
    27	    #
    28	    # @example Implementing a calculator for line items
    29	    #   class MyCalculator < Spree::Calculator
    30	    #     def compute_line_item(line_item)
    31	    #       line_item.amount * 0.1 # 10% of line item amount
    32	    #     end
    33	    #   end
    34	    #
    35	    # @see Spree::CalculatedAdjustments for how calculators connect to calculables, such as
    36	    #      Spree::TaxRate, Spree::ShippingRate, SolidusPromotions::Benefit, or Spree::PromotionAction
    37	    def compute(computable, ...)
    38	      # Spree::LineItem -> :compute_line_item
    39	      computable_name = computable.class.name.demodulize.underscore
    40	      method_name = :"compute_#{computable_name}"
    41	      calculator_class = self.class
    42	      if respond_to?(method_name)
    43	        send(method_name, computable, ...)
    44	      else
    45	        raise NotImplementedError, "Please implement '#{method_name}(#{computable_name})' in your calculator: #{calculator_class.name}"
    46	      end
    47	    end
    48	
    49	    # A description for this calculator in few words
    50	    # @return [String] A description for the calculator
    51	    def self.description
    52	      model_name.human
    53	    end
    54	
    55	    ###################################################################
    56	
    57	    def to_s
    58	      self.class.name.titleize.gsub("Calculator/", "")
    59	    end
    60	
    61	    def description
    62	      self.class.description
    63	    end
    64	
    65	    def available?(_object)
    66	      true
    67	    end
    68	  end
    69	end

    96	    def last_incomplete_spree_order(store: nil, only_frontend_viewable: true)
    97	      self_orders = orders
    98	      self_orders = self_orders.where(frontend_viewable: true) if only_frontend_viewable
    99	      self_orders = self_orders.where(store:) if store
   100	      self_orders = self_orders.where("updated_at > ?", Spree::Config.completable_order_updated_cutoff_days.days.ago) if Spree::Config.completable_order_updated_cutoff_days
   101	      self_orders = self_orders.where("created_at > ?", Spree::Config.completable_order_created_cutoff_days.days.ago) if Spree::Config.completable_order_created_cutoff_days
   102	      last_order = self_orders.order(:created_at).last

   131	    # Updates the roles in keeping with the given ability's permissions
   132	    #
   133	    # Roles that are not accessible to the given ability will be ignored. It
   134	    # also ensure not to remove non accessible roles when assigning new
   135	    # accessible ones.
   136	    #
   137	    # @param given_roles [Spree::Role]
   138	    # @param ability [Spree::Ability]
   139	    def update_spree_roles(given_roles, ability:)
   140	      accessible_roles = Spree::Role.accessible_by(ability)
   141	      non_accessible_roles = Spree::Role.all - accessible_roles
   142	      new_accessible_roles = given_roles - non_accessible_roles
   143	      self.spree_roles = spree_roles - accessible_roles + new_accessible_roles
   144	    end

   149	      raise ActiveRecord::DeleteRestrictionError unless can_be_deleted?

   209	    def self.like_any(fields, values)

     3	module Spree
     4	  # == Master Variant
     5	  #
     6	  # Every product has one master variant, which stores master price and SKU,
     7	  # size and weight, etc. The master variant does not have option values
     8	  # associated with it. Contains on_hand inventory levels only when there are
     9	  # no variants for the product.
    10	  #
    11	  # == Variants
    12	  #
    13	  # All variants can access the product properties directly (via reverse
    14	  # delegation). Inventory units are tied to Variant.  The master variant can
    15	  # have inventory units, but not option values. All other variants have
    16	  # option values and may have inventory units. Sum of on_hand each variant's
    17	  # inventory level determine "on_hand" level for the product.
    18	  class Variant < Spree::Base
    19	    acts_as_list scope: :product
    20	
    21	    include Spree::SoftDeletable
    22	
    23	    after_discard do

    32	    # you might have to modify the output on the frontend or in feeds accordingly.
    33	    enum :condition, {damaged: "damaged", new: "new", refurbished: "refurbished", used: "used"}, prefix: true

    40	      :meta_description, :meta_keywords,
    41	      to: :product

    43	    delegate :shipping_category, :shipping_category_id,
    44	      to: :product, prefix: true
    45	    delegate :tax_rates, to: :tax_category

    47	
    48	    has_many :inventory_units, inverse_of: :variant

    92	    # Returns variants that are in stock. When stock locations are provided as
    93	    # a parameter, the scope is limited to variants that are in stock in the
    94	    # provided stock locations.
    95	    #
    96	    # If you want to also include backorderable variants see {Spree::Variant.suppliable}
    97	    #
    98	    # @param stock_locations [Array<Spree::StockLocation>] the stock locations to check
    99	    # @return [ActiveRecord::Relation]
   100	    def self.in_stock(stock_locations = nil)
   101	      return all unless Spree::Config.track_inventory_levels
   102	      in_stock_variants = joins(:stock_items).where(Spree::StockItem.arel_table[:count_on_hand].gt(0).or(arel_table[:track_inventory].eq(false)))
   103	      if stock_locations.present?
   104	        in_stock_variants = in_stock_variants.where(spree_stock_items: {stock_location_id: stock_locations.map(&:id)})
   105	      end
   106	      in_stock_variants.distinct
   107	    end
   108	
   109	    # Returns a scope of Variants which are suppliable. This includes:
   110	    # * in_stock variants
   111	    # * backorderable variants
   112	    # * variants which do not track stock
   113	    #
   114	    # @return [ActiveRecord::Relation]
   115	    def self.suppliable
   116	      return all unless Spree::Config.track_inventory_levels
   117	      arel_conditions = [
   118	        arel_table[:track_inventory].eq(false),
   119	        Spree::StockItem.arel_table[:count_on_hand].gt(0),
   120	        Spree::StockItem.arel_table[:backorderable].eq(true)
   121	      ]
   122	      joins(:stock_items).where(arel_conditions.inject(:or)).distinct
   123	    end
   124	
   125	    self.allowed_ransackable_associations = %w[option_values product prices default_price]
   126	    self.allowed_ransackable_attributes = %w[weight sku]
   127	
   128	    # Returns variants that have a price for the given pricing options
   129	    # If you have modified the pricing options class, you might want to modify this scope too.
   130	    #
   131	    # @param pricing_options A Pricing Options object as defined on the price selector class
   132	    # @return [ActiveRecord::Relation]
   133	    def self.with_prices(pricing_options = Spree::Config.default_pricing_options)
   134	      where(
   135	        Spree::Price
   136	          .where(Spree::Variant.arel_table[:id].eq(Spree::Price.arel_table[:variant_id])).
   137	          # This next clause should just be `where(pricing_options.search_arguments)`, but ActiveRecord
   138	          # generates invalid SQL, so the SQL here is written manually.
   139	          where(
   140	            "spree_prices.currency = ? AND (spree_prices.country_iso IS NULL OR spree_prices.country_iso = ?)",
   141	            pricing_options.search_arguments[:currency],
   142	            pricing_options.search_arguments[:country_iso].compact
   143	          )
   144	          .arel.exists
   145	      )
   146	    end
   147

   152	    #
   153	    def tax_category
   154	      super || product_tax_category
   155	    end
   156	
   157	    # @return [Integer] the variant's tax category ID
   158	    #
   159	    # This returns the product's tax category ID if the tax category ID on the variant is nil. It looks
   160	    # like an association, but really is an override.
   161	    #
   162	    def tax_category_id
   163	      super || product_tax_category_id
   164	    end
   165	
   166	    # @return [Spree::ShippingCategory] the variant's shipping category
   167	    #
   168	    # This returns the product's shipping category if the shipping category ID on the variant is nil. It looks
   169	    # like an association, but really is an override.
   170	    #
   171	    def shipping_category
   172	      super || product_shipping_category

   174	
   175	    # @return [Integer] the variant's shipping category id

   178	    #

   181	    end
   182	
   183	    # Sets the cost_price for the variant.
   184	    #
   185	    # @param price [Any] the price to set
   186	    # @return [Bignum]
   187	    def cost_price=(price)
   188	      self[:cost_price] = Spree::LocalizedNumber.parse(price) if price.present?
   189	    end
   190

   195	    def weight=(weight)

   198

   205

The promotion gems add an important second layer: current `solidus_promotions` patches `Order` with promotion associations and recalculates discounts through `OrderAdjuster`; `legacy_promotions` also patches `OrderUpdater` and `Order` and keeps older eligibility semantics. I’m now tying that to API/admin mutation paths and specs.

## api/app/controllers/spree/api/orders_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Api
     5	    class OrdersController < Spree::Api::BaseController
     6	      class_attribute :admin_shipment_attributes
     7	      self.admin_shipment_attributes = [:shipping_method, :stock_location, inventory_units: [:variant_id, :sku]]
     8	
     9	      class_attribute :admin_order_attributes
    10	      self.admin_order_attributes = [:import, :number, :completed_at, :locked_at, :channel, :user_id, :created_at]
    11	
    12	      class_attribute :admin_payment_attributes
    13	      self.admin_payment_attributes = [:payment_method, :amount, :state, source: {}]
    14	
    15	      before_action :find_order, except: [:create, :mine, :current, :index]
    16	      around_action :lock_order, except: [:create, :mine, :current, :index, :show]
    17	
    18	      # Dynamically defines our stores checkout steps to ensure we check authorization on each step.
    19	      Spree::Order.checkout_steps.keys.each do |step|
    20	        define_method step do
    21	          authorize! :update, @order, params[:token]
    22	        end
    23	      end
    24	
    25	      def cancel
    26	        authorize! :update, @order, params[:token]
    27	        @order.canceled_by(current_api_user)
    28	        respond_with(@order, default_template: :show)
    29	      end
    30	
    31	      def create
    32	        authorize! :create, Order
    33	
    34	        if can?(:admin, Order)
    35	          @order = Spree::Core::Importer::Order.import(determine_order_user, order_params)
    36	          respond_with(@order, default_template: :show, status: 201)
    37	        else
    38	          @order = Spree::Order.create!(user: current_api_user, store: current_store)
    39	          if @order.contents.update_cart order_params
    40	            respond_with(@order, default_template: :show, status: 201)
    41	          else
    42	            invalid_resource!(@order)
    43	          end
    44	        end
    45	      end
    46	
    47	      def empty
    48	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    49	
    50	        if @order.complete?
    51	          invalid_resource!(@order)
    52	        else
    53	          @order.empty!
    54	          respond_with(@order, default_template: :show)
    55	        end
    56	      end
    57	
    58	      def index
    59	        authorize! :admin, Order
    60	        orders_includes = [
    61	          {user: :store_credits},
    62	          :line_items,
    63	          :valid_store_credit_payments
    64	        ]
    65	        @orders = paginate(
    66	          Spree::Order
    67	            .ransack(params[:q])
    68	            .result
    69	            .includes(orders_includes)
    70	        )
    71	        respond_with(@orders)
    72	      end
    73	
    74	      def show
    75	        authorize! :show, @order, order_token
    76	        respond_with(@order)
    77	      end
    78	
    79	      def update
    80	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    81	
    82	        if @order.contents.update_cart(order_params)
    83	          user_id = params[:order][:user_id]
    84	          if can?(:admin, @order) && user_id
    85	            @order.associate_user!(Spree.user_class.find(user_id))
    86	          end
    87	          respond_with(@order, default_template: :show)
    88	        else
    89	          invalid_resource!(@order)
    90	        end
    91	      end
    92	
    93	      def current
    94	        if current_api_user && (@order = current_api_user.last_incomplete_spree_order(store: current_store))
    95	          respond_with(@order, default_template: :show, locals: {root_object: @order})
    96	        else
    97	          head :no_content
    98	        end
    99	      end
   100	
   101	      def mine
   102	        if current_api_user
   103	          @orders = current_api_user.orders.by_store(current_store).reverse_chronological.ransack(params[:q]).result
   104	          @orders = paginate(@orders)
   105	        else
   106	          render "spree/api/errors/unauthorized", status: :unauthorized
   107	        end
   108	      end
   109	
   110	      private
   111	
   112	      def order_params
   113	        if params[:order]
   114	          normalize_params
   115	          prevent_customer_metadata_update
   116	          params.require(:order).permit(permitted_order_attributes)
   117	        else
   118	          {}
   119	        end
   120	      end
   121	
   122	      def prevent_customer_metadata_update
   123	        return unless @order&.completed? && cannot?(:admin, Spree::Order)
   124	
   125	        params[:order]&.delete(:customer_metadata)
   126	      end
   127	
   128	      def normalize_params
   129	        if params[:order][:payments]
   130	          payments_params = params[:order].delete(:payments)
   131	          params[:order][:payments_attributes] = payments_params.map do |payment_params|
   132	            payment_params[:source_attributes] = payment_params.delete(:source) if payment_params[:source].present?
   133	            payment_params
   134	          end
   135	        end
   136	        params[:order][:shipments_attributes] = params[:order].delete(:shipments) if params[:order][:shipments]
   137	        params[:order][:line_items_attributes] = params[:order].delete(:line_items) if params[:order][:line_items]
   138	        params[:order][:ship_address_attributes] = params[:order].delete(:ship_address) if params[:order][:ship_address].present?
   139	        params[:order][:bill_address_attributes] = params[:order].delete(:bill_address) if params[:order][:bill_address].present?
   140	      end
   141	
   142	      # @api public
   143	      def determine_order_user
   144	        if order_params[:user_id].present?
   145	          Spree.user_class.find(order_params[:user_id])
   146	        else
   147	          current_api_user
   148	        end
   149	      end
   150	
   151	      def permitted_order_attributes
   152	        can?(:admin, Spree::Order) ? (super + admin_order_attributes) : super
   153	      end
   154	
   155	      def permitted_shipment_attributes
   156	        if can?(:admin, Spree::Shipment)
   157	          super + admin_shipment_attributes
   158	        else
   159	          super
   160	        end
   161	      end
   162	
   163	      def permitted_payment_attributes
   164	        if can?(:admin, Spree::Payment)
   165	          super + admin_payment_attributes
   166	        else
   167	          super
   168	        end
   169	      end
   170	
   171	      def find_order(_lock = false)
   172	        @order = Spree::Order
   173	          .includes(line_items: [:adjustments, {variant: :images}],
   174	            payments: :payment_method,
   175	            shipments: {
   176	              shipping_rates: {shipping_method: :zones, taxes: :tax_rate}
   177	            })
   178	          .find_by!(number: params[:id])
   179	      end
   180	
   181	      def order_id
   182	        super || params[:id]
   183	      end
   184	    end
   185	  end
   186	end

## api/app/controllers/spree/api/checkouts_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Api
     5	    class CheckoutsController < Spree::Api::BaseController
     6	      before_action :load_order, only: [:next, :advance, :update, :complete]
     7	      around_action :lock_order, only: [:next, :advance, :update, :complete]
     8	      before_action :update_order_state, only: [:next, :advance, :update, :complete]
     9	
    10	      rescue_from Spree::Order::InsufficientStock, with: :insufficient_stock_error
    11	
    12	      include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::PaymentParameters
    13	
    14	      include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::Order
    15	
    16	      def next
    17	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    18	        if !expected_total_ok?(params[:expected_total])
    19	          respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/expected_total_mismatch", status: 400)
    20	          return
    21	        end
    22	        @order.next!
    23	        respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/show", status: 200)
    24	      end
    25	
    26	      def advance
    27	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    28	        @order.contents.advance
    29	        respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/show", status: 200)
    30	      end
    31	
    32	      def complete
    33	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    34	        if !expected_total_ok?(params[:expected_total])
    35	          respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/expected_total_mismatch", status: 400)
    36	        else
    37	          @order.complete!
    38	          respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/show", status: 200)
    39	        end
    40	      end
    41	
    42	      def update
    43	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    44	
    45	        if Spree::Config.order_update_attributes_class.new(@order, update_params, request_env: request.headers.env).call
    46	          if can?(:admin, @order) && user_id.present?
    47	            @order.associate_user!(Spree.user_class.find(user_id))
    48	          end
    49	
    50	          return if after_update_attributes
    51	
    52	          if @order.completed? || @order.next!
    53	            state_callback(:after)
    54	            respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/show")
    55	          end
    56	        else
    57	          invalid_resource!(@order)
    58	        end
    59	      end
    60	
    61	      private
    62	
    63	      def user_id
    64	        params[:order][:user_id] if params[:order]
    65	      end
    66	
    67	      def update_params
    68	        state = @order.state
    69	        case state.to_sym
    70	        when :cart, :address
    71	          massaged_params.fetch(:order, {}).permit(
    72	            permitted_checkout_address_attributes
    73	          )
    74	        when :delivery
    75	          massaged_params.require(:order).permit(
    76	            permitted_checkout_delivery_attributes
    77	          )
    78	        when :payment
    79	          massaged_params.require(:order).permit(
    80	            permitted_checkout_payment_attributes
    81	          )
    82	        else
    83	          massaged_params.fetch(:order, {}).permit(
    84	            permitted_checkout_confirm_attributes
    85	          )
    86	        end
    87	      end
    88	
    89	      def massaged_params
    90	        massaged_params = params.deep_dup
    91	
    92	        set_payment_parameters_amount(massaged_params, @order)
    93	
    94	        massaged_params
    95	      end
    96	
    97	      # Should be overridden if you have areas of your checkout that don't match
    98	      # up to a step within checkout_steps, such as a registration step
    99	      def skip_state_validation?
   100	        false
   101	      end
   102	
   103	      def load_order
   104	        @order = Spree::Order.find_by!(number: params[:id])
   105	      end
   106	
   107	      def update_order_state
   108	        @order.state = params[:state] if params[:state]
   109	        state_callback(:before)
   110	      end
   111	
   112	      def state_callback(before_or_after = :before)
   113	        method_name = :"#{before_or_after}_#{@order.state}"
   114	        send(method_name) if respond_to?(method_name, true)
   115	      end
   116	
   117	      def after_update_attributes
   118	        false
   119	      end
   120	
   121	      def order_id
   122	        super || params[:id]
   123	      end
   124	
   125	      def expected_total_ok?(expected_total)
   126	        return true if expected_total.blank?
   127	        @order.total == BigDecimal(expected_total)
   128	      end
   129	    end
   130	  end
   131	end

## api/app/controllers/spree/api/shipments_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true

     3	module Spree
     4	  module Api
     5	    class ShipmentsController < Spree::Api::BaseController
     6	      before_action :find_order_on_create, only: :create
     7	      before_action :find_shipment, only: [:update, :ship, :ready, :add, :remove, :estimated_rates, :select_shipping_method]
     8	      before_action :load_transfer_params, only: [:transfer_to_location, :transfer_to_shipment]
     9	      around_action :lock_order, except: [:mine, :estimated_rates]
    10	      before_action :update_shipment, only: [:ship, :ready, :add, :remove]
    11	
    12	      def mine
    13	        if current_api_user
    14	          @shipments = Spree::Shipment
    15	            .reverse_chronological
    16	            .joins(:order)
    17	            .where(spree_orders: {user_id: current_api_user.id})
    18	            .includes(mine_includes)
    19	            .ransack(params[:q]).result
    20	
    21	          @shipments = paginate(@shipments)
    22	        else
    23	          render "spree/api/errors/unauthorized", status: :unauthorized
    24	        end
    25	      end
    26	
    27	      def estimated_rates
    28	        authorize! :update, @shipment
    29	        estimator = Spree::Config.stock.estimator_class.new
    30	        @shipping_rates = estimator.shipping_rates(@shipment.to_package, false)
    31	      end
    32	
    33	      def select_shipping_method
    34	        authorize! :update, @shipment
    35	        shipping_method = Spree::ShippingMethod.find(params.require(:shipping_method_id))
    36	        @shipment.select_shipping_method(shipping_method)
    37	        @order.recalculate
    38	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    39	      end
    40	
    41	      def create
    42	        authorize! :create, Shipment
    43	        @shipment = @order.shipments.create(stock_location_id: params.fetch(:stock_location_id))
    44	
    45	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    46	      end
    47	
    48	      def update
    49	        @shipment.update_attributes_and_order(shipment_params)
    50	
    51	        respond_with(@shipment.reload, default_template: :show)
    52	      end
    53	
    54	      def ready
    55	        unless @shipment.ready?
    56	          if @shipment.can_ready?
    57	            @shipment.ready!
    58	          else
    59	            logger.error("cannot_ready_shipment shipment_state=#{@shipment.state}")
    60	            render("spree/api/shipments/cannot_ready_shipment", status: 422) && return
    61	          end
    62	        end
    63	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    64	      end
    65	
    66	      def ship
    67	        authorize! :ship, @shipment
    68	        unless @shipment.shipped?
    69	          @shipment.suppress_mailer = (params[:send_mailer] == "false")
    70	          @shipment.ship!
    71	        end
    72	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    73	      end
    74	
    75	      def add
    76	        quantity = params[:quantity].to_i
    77	
    78	        @shipment.order.contents.add(variant, quantity, {shipment: @shipment})
    79	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    80	      end
    81	
    82	      def remove
    83	        quantity = params[:quantity].to_i
    84	
    85	        if @shipment.shipped? || @shipment.canceled?
    86	          @shipment.errors.add(:base, :cannot_remove_items_shipment_state, state: @shipment.state)
    87	          invalid_resource!(@shipment)
    88	        else
    89	          @shipment.order.contents.remove(variant, quantity, {shipment: @shipment})
    90	          @shipment.reload if @shipment.persisted?
    91	          respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    92	        end
    93	      end
    94	
    95	      def transfer_to_location
    96	        @desired_stock_location = Spree::StockLocation.find(params[:stock_location_id])
    97	        @desired_shipment = @original_shipment.order.shipments.build(stock_location: @desired_stock_location)
    98	        transfer_to_shipment
    99	      end
   100	
   101	      def transfer_to_shipment
   102	        @desired_shipment ||= Spree::Shipment.find_by!(number: params[:target_shipment_number])
   103	
   104	        fulfilment_changer = Spree::FulfilmentChanger.new(
   105	          current_shipment: @original_shipment,
   106	          desired_shipment: @desired_shipment,
   107	          variant: @variant,
   108	          quantity: @quantity,
   109	          track_inventory: Spree::Config.track_inventory_levels
   110	        )
   111	
   112	        if fulfilment_changer.run!
   113	          render json: {success: true, message: t("spree.api.shipment.transfer_success")}, status: :accepted
   114	        else
   115	          render json: {success: false, message: fulfilment_changer.errors.full_messages.to_sentence}, status: :accepted
   116	        end
   117	      end
   118	
   119	      private
   120	
   121	      def load_transfer_params
   122	        @original_shipment = Spree::Shipment.find_by!(number: params[:original_shipment_number])
   123	        @order = @original_shipment.order
   124	        @variant = Spree::Variant.find(params[:variant_id])
   125	        @quantity = params[:quantity].to_i
   126	        authorize! [:update, :destroy], @original_shipment
   127	        authorize! :create, Shipment
   128	      end
   129	
   130	      def find_order_on_create
   131	        @order = Spree::Order.find_by!(number: params[:shipment][:order_id])
   132	        authorize! :show, @order
   133	      end
   134	
   135	      def find_shipment
   136	        if @order.present?
   137	          @shipment = @order.shipments.find_by!(number: params[:id])
   138	        else
   139	          @shipment = Spree::Shipment.readonly(false).find_by!(number: params[:id])
   140	          @order = @shipment.order
   141	        end
   142	        authorize! :update, @shipment
   143	      end
   144	
   145	      def update_shipment
   146	        @shipment.update(shipment_params)
   147	        @shipment.reload
   148	      end
   149	
   150	      def shipment_params
   151	        if params[:shipment] && !params[:shipment].empty?
   152	          params.require(:shipment).permit(permitted_shipment_attributes)
   153	        else
   154	          {}
   155	        end
   156	      end
   157	
   158	      def variant
   159	        @variant ||= Spree::Variant.unscoped.find(params.fetch(:variant_id))
   160	      end
   161	
   162	      def mine_includes
   163	        {
   164	          order: {
   165	            bill_address: {
   166	              state: {},
   167	              country: {}
   168	            },
   169	            ship_address: {
   170	              state: {},
   171	              country: {}
   172	            },
   173	            adjustments: {},
   174	            payments: {
   175	              order: {},
   176	              payment_method: {}
   177	            }
   178	          },
   179	          inventory_units: {
   180	            line_item: {
   181	              product: {},
   182	              variant: {}
   183	            },
   184	            variant: {
   185	              product: {},
   186	              prices: {},
   187	              option_values: {
   188	                option_type: {}
   189	              }
   190	            }
   191	          }
   192	        }
   193	      end
   194	    end
   195	  end
   196	end

     6	      before_action :find_order

     6	      before_action :load_order

    16	          render "spree/api/promotions/handler", status: 200
    17	        else
    18	          logger.error("apply_coupon_code_error=#{@handler.error.inspect}")
    19	          render "spree/api/promotions/handler", status: 422
    20	        end
    21	      end

    23	      def destroy

    26	        @order.coupon_code = params[:id]

    28	
    29	        if @handler.successful?

    31	        else

    34	        end
    35	      end

## api/app/controllers/spree/api/base_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	require "spree/api/responders"
     4	
     5	module Spree
     6	  module Api
     7	    class BaseController < ActionController::Base
     8	      self.responder = Spree::Api::Responders::AppResponder
     9	      respond_to :json
    10	      protect_from_forgery unless: -> { request.format.json? }
    11	
    12	      include CanCan::ControllerAdditions
    13	      include ActiveStorage::SetCurrent
    14	      include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::Store
    15	      include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::Pricing
    16	      include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::StrongParameters
    17	
    18	      class_attribute :admin_line_item_attributes
    19	      self.admin_line_item_attributes = [:price, :variant_id, :sku]
    20	
    21	      class_attribute :admin_metadata_attributes
    22	      self.admin_metadata_attributes = [{admin_metadata: {}}]
    23	
    24	      before_action :deprecated_load_user
    25	      before_action :authorize_for_order, if: proc { order_token.present? }
    26	      before_action :authenticate_user
    27	      # This is deprecated and will be removed in Spree 5.0
    28	      before_action :load_deprecated_user_roles
    29	
    30	      rescue_from ActionController::ParameterMissing, with: :parameter_missing_error
    31	      rescue_from ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound, with: :not_found
    32	      rescue_from CanCan::AccessDenied, with: :unauthorized
    33	      rescue_from Spree::Core::GatewayError, with: :gateway_error
    34	      rescue_from StateMachines::InvalidTransition, with: :invalid_transition
    35	
    36	      helper Spree::Api::ApiHelpers
    37	      helper_method :current_user_roles, :current_api_user
    38	
    39	      private
    40	
    41	      Spree::Api::Config.metadata_permit_parameters.each do |resource|
    42	        define_method("permitted_#{resource.to_s.underscore}_attributes") do
    43	          if can?(:admin, "Spree::#{resource}".constantize)
    44	            super() + admin_metadata_attributes
    45	          else
    46	            super()
    47	          end
    48	        end
    49	      end
    50	
    51	      # users should be able to set price when importing orders via api
    52	      def permitted_line_item_attributes
    53	        if can?(:admin, Spree::LineItem)
    54	          super + admin_line_item_attributes + admin_metadata_attributes
    55	        else
    56	          super
    57	        end
    58	      end
    59	
    60	      def permitted_user_attributes
    61	        can?(:admin, Spree.user_class) ? super + admin_metadata_attributes : super
    62	      end
    63	
    64	      def current_api_user
    65	        @_current_api_user ||= Spree.user_class.find_by(spree_api_key: api_key.to_s)
    66	      end
    67	
    68	      def authenticate_user
    69	        unless current_api_user
    70	          if requires_authentication? && api_key.blank? && order_token.blank?
    71	            render "spree/api/errors/must_specify_api_key", status: :unauthorized
    72	          elsif order_token.blank? && (requires_authentication? || api_key.present?)
    73	            render "spree/api/errors/invalid_api_key", status: :unauthorized
    74	          end
    75	        end
    76	      end
    77	
    78	      def load_deprecated_user_roles
    79	        @current_user_roles = if Rails.version < Gem::Version.new("7.2.0")
    80	          ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy.new(self, :current_user_roles, :@current_user_roles, Spree.deprecator)
    81	        else
    82	          ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy.new(self, :current_user_roles, :@current_user_roles, deprecator: Spree.deprecator)
    83	        end
    84	      end
    85	
    86	      def deprecated_load_user
    87	        @current_api_user = if Rails.version < Gem::Version.new("7.2.0")
    88	          ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy.new(self, :current_api_user, :@current_api_user, Spree.deprecator)
    89	        else
    90	          ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy.new(self, :current_api_user, :@current_api_user, deprecator: Spree.deprecator)
    91	        end
    92	      end
    93	
    94	      def current_user_roles
    95	        @_current_user_roles ||= if current_api_user
    96	          current_api_user.spree_roles.pluck(:name)
    97	        else
    98	          []
    99	        end
   100	      end
   101	
   102	      def unauthorized
   103	        render "spree/api/errors/unauthorized", status: :unauthorized
   104	      end
   105	
   106	      def gateway_error(exception)
   107	        # Fall back to a blank order if one isn't set, as we only need this for
   108	        # its errors interface.
   109	        model = @order || Spree::Order.new
   110	        model.errors.add(:base, exception.message)
   111	        invalid_resource!(model)
   112	      end
   113	
   114	      def parameter_missing_error(exception)
   115	        # use original_message to remove DidYouMean suggestions, if defined
   116	        message = exception.try(:original_message) || exception.message
   117	        render json: {
   118	          exception: message,
   119	          error: message,
   120	          missing_param: exception.param
   121	        }, status: :unprocessable_entity
   122	      end
   123	
   124	      def requires_authentication?
   125	        Spree::Api::Config[:requires_authentication]
   126	      end
   127	
   128	      def not_found
   129	        render "spree/api/errors/not_found", status: :not_found
   130	      end
   131	
   132	      def current_ability
   133	        Spree::Ability.new(current_api_user)
   134	      end
   135	
   136	      def invalid_resource!(resource)
   137	        Rails.logger.error "invalid_resouce_errors=#{resource.errors.full_messages}"
   138	        @resource = resource
   139	        render "spree/api/errors/invalid_resource", status: :unprocessable_entity
   140	      end
   141	
   142	      def api_key
   143	        bearer_token || params[:token]
   144	      end
   145	      helper_method :api_key
   146	
   147	      def bearer_token
   148	        pattern = /^Bearer /
   149	        header = request.headers["Authorization"]
   150	        header.gsub(pattern, "") if header.present? && header.match(pattern)
   151	      end
   152	
   153	      def order_token
   154	        request.headers["X-Spree-Order-Token"] || params[:order_token]
   155	      end
   156	
   157	      def find_product(id)
   158	        product_scope.friendly.find(id.to_s)
   159	      rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
   160	        product_scope.find(id)
   161	      end
   162	
   163	      def product_scope
   164	        if can?(:admin, Spree::Product)
   165	          scope = Spree::Product.with_discarded.accessible_by(current_ability).includes(*product_includes)
   166	
   167	          unless params[:show_deleted]
   168	            scope = scope.not_deleted
   169	          end
   170	        else
   171	          scope = Spree::Product.accessible_by(current_ability).available.includes(*product_includes)
   172	        end
   173	
   174	        scope
   175	      end
   176	
   177	      def variants_associations
   178	        [{option_values: :option_type}, :prices, :images]
   179	      end
   180	
   181	      def product_includes
   182	        [:option_types, :taxons, product_properties: :property, variants: variants_associations, master: variants_associations]
   183	      end
   184	
   185	      def order_id
   186	        params[:order_id] || params[:checkout_id] || params[:order_number]
   187	      end
   188	
   189	      def authorize_for_order
   190	        @order = Spree::Order.find_by(number: order_id)
   191	        authorize! :show, @order, order_token
   192	      end
   193	
   194	      def lock_order
   195	        OrderMutex.with_lock!(@order) { yield }
   196	      rescue Spree::OrderMutex::LockFailed => error
   197	        render plain: error.message, status: :conflict
   198	      end
   199	
   200	      def insufficient_stock_error(exception)
   201	        logger.error "insufficient_stock_error #{exception.inspect}"
   202	        render(
   203	          json: {
   204	            errors: [I18n.t(:quantity_is_not_available, scope: "spree.api.order")],
   205	            type: "insufficient_stock"
   206	          },
   207	          status: :unprocessable_entity
   208	        )
   209	      end
   210	
   211	      def paginate(resource)
   212	        resource
   213	          .page(params[:page])
   214	          .per(params[:per_page] || default_per_page)
   215	      end
   216	
   217	      def default_per_page
   218	        Kaminari.config.default_per_page
   219	      end
   220	
   221	      def invalid_transition(error)
   222	        logger.error("invalid_transition #{error.event} from #{error.from} for #{error.object.class.name}. Error: #{error.inspect}")
   223	
   224	        render "spree/api/errors/could_not_transition", locals: {resource: error.object}, status: :unprocessable_entity
   225	      end
   226	    end
   227	  end
   228	end

## backend/app/controllers/spree/admin/orders_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Admin
     5	    class OrdersController < Spree::Admin::BaseController
     6	      before_action :initialize_order_events
     7	      before_action :load_order, only: [:edit, :complete, :advance, :cancel, :resume, :approve, :resend, :unfinalize_adjustments, :finalize_adjustments, :cart, :confirm]
     8	      around_action :lock_order, only: [:advance, :complete, :confirm, :cancel, :resume, :approve, :resend]
     9	
    10	      rescue_from Spree::Order::InsufficientStock, with: :insufficient_stock_error
    11	      respond_to :html
    12	
    13	      def show
    14	        redirect_to action: :edit
    15	      end
    16	
    17	      def index
    18	        params[:q] ||= {}
    19	        params[:q][:completed_at_not_null] ||= "1" if Spree::Config[:show_only_complete_orders_by_default]
    20	        @show_only_completed = params[:q][:completed_at_not_null] == "1"
    21	        params[:q][:s] ||= @show_only_completed ? "completed_at desc" : "created_at desc"
    22	        params[:q][:completed_at_not_null] = "" unless @show_only_completed
    23	
    24	        # As date params are deleted if @show_only_completed, store
    25	        # the original date so we can restore them into the params
    26	        # after the search
    27	        created_at_gt = params[:q][:created_at_gt]
    28	        created_at_lt = params[:q][:created_at_lt]
    29	
    30	        params[:q].delete(:inventory_units_shipment_id_null) if params[:q][:inventory_units_shipment_id_null] == "0"
    31	
    32	        if params[:q][:created_at_gt].present?
    33	          params[:q][:created_at_gt] = begin
    34	            Time.zone.parse(params[:q][:created_at_gt]).beginning_of_day
    35	          rescue
    36	            ""
    37	          end
    38	        end
    39	
    40	        if params[:q][:created_at_lt].present?
    41	          params[:q][:created_at_lt] = begin
    42	            Time.zone.parse(params[:q][:created_at_lt]).end_of_day
    43	          rescue
    44	            ""
    45	          end
    46	        end
    47	
    48	        if @show_only_completed
    49	          params[:q][:completed_at_gt] = params[:q].delete(:created_at_gt)
    50	          params[:q][:completed_at_lt] = params[:q].delete(:created_at_lt)
    51	        end
    52	
    53	        @search = Spree::Order.accessible_by(current_ability, :index).ransack(params[:q])
    54	        @orders = @search.result.includes([:user])
    55	          .page(params[:page])
    56	          .per(params[:per_page] || Spree::Config[:orders_per_page])
    57	
    58	        # Restore dates
    59	        params[:q][:created_at_gt] = created_at_gt
    60	        params[:q][:created_at_lt] = created_at_lt
    61	      end
    62	
    63	      def new
    64	        user = Spree.user_class.find_by(id: params[:user_id]) if params[:user_id]
    65	        order_importer_params = order_params
    66	        order_importer_params[:bill_address] = user&.bill_address
    67	        order_importer_params[:ship_address] = user&.ship_address
    68	
    69	        @order = Spree::Core::Importer::Order.import(user, order_importer_params)
    70	        redirect_to cart_admin_order_url(@order)
    71	      end
    72	
    73	      def edit
    74	        require_ship_address
    75	      end
    76	
    77	      def cart
    78	        if @order.shipped_shipments.count > 0
    79	          redirect_to edit_admin_order_url(@order)
    80	        end
    81	      end
    82	
    83	      def advance
    84	        if @order.completed?
    85	          flash[:notice] = t("spree.order_already_completed")
    86	          redirect_to edit_admin_order_url(@order)
    87	        else
    88	          @order.contents.advance
    89	
    90	          if @order.can_complete?
    91	            flash[:success] = t("spree.order_ready_for_confirm")
    92	          else
    93	            flash[:error] = @order.errors.full_messages.join(", ")
    94	          end
    95	          redirect_to confirm_admin_order_url(@order)
    96	        end
    97	      end
    98	
    99	      # GET
   100	      def confirm
   101	        if @order.completed?
   102	          redirect_to edit_admin_order_url(@order)
   103	        elsif !@order.can_complete?
   104	          render template: "spree/admin/orders/confirm_advance"
   105	        end
   106	      end
   107	
   108	      # PUT
   109	      def complete
   110	        @order.complete!
   111	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_completed")
   112	        redirect_to edit_admin_order_url(@order)
   113	      rescue StateMachines::InvalidTransition => error
   114	        flash[:error] = error.message
   115	        redirect_to confirm_admin_order_url(@order)
   116	      end
   117	
   118	      def cancel
   119	        @order.canceled_by(spree_current_user)
   120	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_canceled")
   121	        redirect_to(spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order))
   122	      end
   123	
   124	      def resume
   125	        @order.resume!
   126	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_resumed")
   127	        redirect_to(spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order))
   128	      end
   129	
   130	      def approve
   131	        @order.contents.approve(user: spree_current_user)
   132	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_approved")
   133	        redirect_to(spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order))
   134	      end
   135	
   136	      def resend
   137	        Spree::Config.order_mailer_class.confirm_email(@order, true).deliver_later
   138	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_email_resent")
   139	
   140	        redirect_to(spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order))
   141	      end
   142	
   143	      def unfinalize_adjustments
   144	        adjustments = @order.all_adjustments.finalized
   145	        adjustments.each(&:unfinalize!)
   146	        flash[:success] = t("spree.all_adjustments_unfinalized")
   147	
   148	        respond_with(@order) { |format| format.html { redirect_to(spree.admin_order_adjustments_path(@order)) } }
   149	      end
   150	
   151	      def finalize_adjustments
   152	        adjustments = @order.all_adjustments.not_finalized
   153	        adjustments.each(&:finalize!)
   154	        flash[:success] = t("spree.all_adjustments_finalized")
   155	
   156	        respond_with(@order) { |format| format.html { redirect_to(spree.admin_order_adjustments_path(@order)) } }
   157	      end
   158	
   159	      private
   160

   163	          created_by_id: spree_current_user.try(:id),
   164	          frontend_viewable: false,
   165	          store_id: current_store.try(:id)
   166	        }.with_indifferent_access
   167	      end
   168

   171	        authorize! action, @order
   172	      rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
   173	        resource_not_found(flash_class: Spree::Order, redirect_url: admin_orders_path)
   174	      end

## backend/app/controllers/spree/admin/payments_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Admin
     5	    class PaymentsController < Spree::Admin::BaseController
     6	      rescue_from Spree::Order::InsufficientStock, with: :insufficient_stock_error
     7	
     8	      before_action :load_order, only: [:create, :new, :index, :fire]
     9	      before_action :load_payment, except: [:create, :new, :index, :fire]
    10	      before_action :load_payment_for_fire, only: :fire
    11	      before_action :load_data
    12	      before_action :load_log_entries, only: [:show]
    13	      before_action :require_bill_address, only: [:index]
    14	
    15	      helper ::Spree::Admin::OrdersHelper
    16	
    17	      respond_to :html
    18	
    19	      def index
    20	        @payments = @order.payments.includes(refunds: :reason)
    21	        @refunds = @payments.flat_map(&:refunds)
    22	        redirect_to new_admin_order_payment_url(@order) if @payments.empty?
    23	      end
    24	
    25	      def new
    26	        @payment = @order.payments.build(amount: @order.outstanding_balance)
    27	      end
    28	
    29	      def create
    30	        @payment = PaymentCreate.new(@order, object_params).build
    31	        if @payment.payment_method.source_required? && params[:card].present? && params[:card] != "new"
    32	          @payment.source = @payment.payment_method.payment_source_class.find_by(id: params[:card])
    33	        end
    34	
    35	        begin
    36	          if @payment.save
    37	            if @order.completed?
    38	              # If the order was already complete then go ahead and process the payment
    39	              # (auth and/or capture depending on payment method configuration)
    40	              @payment.process! if @payment.checkout?
    41	            else
    42	              # Transition order as far as it will go.
    43	              while @order.next; end
    44	            end
    45	
    46	            flash[:success] = flash_message_for(@payment, :successfully_created)
    47	            redirect_to admin_order_payments_path(@order)
    48	          else
    49	            flash[:error] = t("spree.payment_could_not_be_created")
    50	            render :new
    51	          end
    52	        rescue Spree::Core::GatewayError => error
    53	          flash[:error] = error.message.to_s
    54	          redirect_to new_admin_order_payment_path(@order)
    55	        end
    56	      end
    57	
    58	      def fire
    59	        return unless (event = params[:e]) && @payment.payment_source
    60	
    61	        # Because we have a transition method also called void, we do this to avoid conflicts.
    62	        event = "void_transaction" if event == "void"
    63	        if @payment.send("#{event}!")
    64	          flash[:success] = t("spree.payment_updated")
    65	        else
    66	          flash[:error] = t("spree.cannot_perform_operation")
    67	        end
    68	      rescue Spree::Core::GatewayError => ge
    69	        flash[:error] = ge.message.to_s
    70	      ensure
    71	        redirect_to admin_order_payments_path(@order)
    72	      end
    73	
    74	      private
    75	
    76	      def object_params
    77	        if params[:payment] && params[:payment_source] && (source_params = params.delete(:payment_source)[params[:payment][:payment_method_id]])
    78	          params[:payment][:source_attributes] = source_params
    79	        end
    80	
    81	        params.require(:payment).permit(permitted_payment_attributes)
    82	      end
    83	
    84	      def load_data
    85	        @amount = params[:amount] || load_order.total
    86	        @payment_methods = Spree::PaymentMethod.active.available_to_admin.ordered_by_position
    87	        @payment_method = if @payment&.payment_method
    88	          @payment.payment_method
    89	        else
    90	          @payment_methods.first
    91	        end
    92	      end
    93	
    94	      def load_order
    95	        @order = Spree::Order.find_by!(number: params[:order_id])
    96	        authorize! action, @order
    97	        @order
    98	      rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
    99	        resource_not_found(flash_class: Spree::Order, redirect_url: admin_orders_path)
   100	      end
   101	
   102	      def load_payment
   103	        @payment = Spree::Payment.find(params[:id])
   104	      end
   105	
   106	      def load_log_entries
   107	        @all_log_entries = Spree::LogEntry
   108	          .where(source: @payment)
   109	          .or(Spree::LogEntry.where(source: @payment.refunds))
   110	          .order(:created_at)
   111	      end
   112	
   113	      def load_payment_for_fire
   114	        load_payment
   115	        authorize! params[:e].to_sym, @payment
   116	      end
   117	
   118	      def model_class
   119	        Spree::Payment
   120	      end
   121	
   122	      def require_bill_address
   123	        if Spree::Config[:order_bill_address_used] && @order.bill_address.nil?
   124	          flash[:notice] = t("spree.fill_in_customer_info")
   125	          redirect_to edit_admin_order_customer_url(@order)
   126	        end
   127	      end
   128	
   129	      def insufficient_stock_error
   130	        flash[:error] = t("spree.insufficient_stock_for_order")
   131	        redirect_to new_admin_order_payment_url(@order)
   132	      end
   133	    end
   134	  end
   135	end

## backend/app/controllers/spree/admin/customer_returns_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Admin
     5	    class CustomerReturnsController < ResourceController
     6	      helper "spree/admin/reimbursement_type"
     7	      belongs_to "spree/order", find_by: :number
     8	
     9	      before_action :parent # ensure order gets loaded to support our pseudo parent-child relationship
    10	      before_action :load_form_data, only: [:new, :edit]
    11	      before_action :build_return_items_from_params, only: [:create]
    12	      create.fails :load_form_data
    13	      create.after :order_process_return
    14	
    15	      def edit
    16	        @pending_return_items = @customer_return.return_items.select(&:pending?)
    17	        @accepted_return_items = @customer_return.return_items.select(&:accepted?)
    18	        @rejected_return_items = @customer_return.return_items.select(&:rejected?)
    19	        @manual_intervention_return_items = @customer_return.return_items.select(&:manual_intervention_required?)
    20	        @pending_reimbursements = @customer_return.reimbursements.select(&:pending?)
    21	
    22	        super
    23	      end
    24	
    25	      private
    26	
    27	      def order_process_return
    28	        @customer_return.process_return!
    29	      end
    30	
    31	      def location_after_save
    32	        url_for([:edit, :admin, @order, @customer_return])
    33	      end
    34	
    35	      def build_resource
    36	        Spree::CustomerReturn.new
    37	      end
    38	
    39	      def find_resource
    40	        Spree::CustomerReturn.accessible_by(current_ability, :show).find(params[:id])
    41	      end
    42	
    43	      def collection
    44	        parent # trigger loading the order
    45	        return unless @order
    46	
    47	        @collection ||= Spree::ReturnItem
    48	          .accessible_by(current_ability)
    49	          .where(inventory_unit_id: @order.inventory_units.pluck(:id))
    50	          .map(&:customer_return).uniq.compact
    51	        @customer_returns = @collection
    52	      end
    53	
    54	      def load_form_data
    55	        return_items = @order.inventory_units.map(&:current_or_new_return_item).reject(&:customer_return_id)
    56	        @rma_return_items, @new_return_items = return_items.partition(&:return_authorization_id)
    57	        load_return_reasons
    58	      end
    59	
    60	      def load_return_reasons
    61	        @reasons = Spree::ReturnReason.reasons_for_return_items(@customer_return.return_items)
    62	      end
    63	
    64	      def permitted_resource_params
    65	        @permitted_resource_params ||= params.require("customer_return").permit(permitted_customer_return_attributes)
    66	      end
    67	
    68	      def build_return_items_from_params
    69	        return_items_params = permitted_resource_params.delete(:return_items_attributes).values
    70	        @customer_return.return_items = return_items_params.map do |item_params|
    71	          next unless item_params.delete("returned") == "1"
    72	          return_item = item_params[:id] ? Spree::ReturnItem.find(item_params[:id]) : Spree::ReturnItem.new
    73	          return_item.assign_attributes(item_params)
    74	
    75	          if item_params[:reception_status_event].blank?
    76	            return redirect_to(new_object_url, flash: {error: "Reception status choice required"})
    77	          end
    78	          return_item
    79	        end.compact
    80	      end
    81	    end
    82	  end
    83	end

## backend/app/controllers/spree/admin/return_authorizations_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
