     3	module Spree
     4	  module Admin
     5	    class ReturnAuthorizationsController < ResourceController
     6	      belongs_to "spree/order", find_by: :number
     7	
     8	      before_action :load_form_data, only: [:new, :edit]
     9	      create.fails :load_form_data
    10	      update.fails :load_form_data
    11	
    12	      def fire
    13	        action_from_params = "#{params[:e]}!"
    14	
    15	        flash_message = if @return_authorization.state_events.include?(params[:e].to_sym) &&
    16	            @return_authorization.send(action_from_params)
    17	
    18	          {success: t("spree.return_authorization_updated")}
    19	        else
    20	          {error: t("spree.return_authorization_fire_error")}
    21	        end
    22	
    23	        redirect_back(fallback_location: admin_order_return_authorizations_path(@order),
    24	          flash: flash_message)
    25	      end
    26	
    27	      private
    28	
    29	      def load_form_data
    30	        load_return_items
    31	        load_reimbursement_types
    32	        load_return_reasons
    33	        load_stock_locations
    34	      end
    35	
    36	      # To satisfy how nested attributes works we want to create placeholder ReturnItems for
    37	      # any InventoryUnits that have not already been added to the ReturnAuthorization.
    38	      def load_return_items
    39	        all_inventory_units = @return_authorization.order.inventory_units
    40	        associated_inventory_units = @return_authorization.return_items.map(&:inventory_unit)
    41	        unassociated_inventory_units = all_inventory_units - associated_inventory_units
    42	
    43	        unassociated_inventory_units.each do |new_unit|
    44	          @return_authorization.return_items
    45	            .build(inventory_unit: new_unit)
    46	            .tap(&:set_default_amount)
    47	        end
    48	
    49	        @form_return_items = @return_authorization.return_items.sort_by(&:inventory_unit_id)
    50	      end
    51	
    52	      def load_reimbursement_types
    53	        @reimbursement_types = Spree::ReimbursementType.accessible_by(current_ability).active
    54	      end
    55	
    56	      def load_return_reasons
    57	        @reasons = Spree::ReturnReason.reasons_for_return_items(@return_authorization.return_items)
    58	      end
    59	
    60	      def load_stock_locations
    61	        @stock_locations = Spree::StockLocation.order_default.active
    62	      end
    63	    end
    64	  end
    65	end

## backend/app/controllers/spree/admin/reimbursements_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Admin
     5	    class ReimbursementsController < ResourceController
     6	      helper "spree/admin/reimbursement_type"
     7	      helper "spree/admin/customer_returns"
     8	      belongs_to "spree/order", find_by: :number
     9	
    10	      before_action :load_stock_locations, only: :edit
    11	      before_action :load_simulated_refunds, only: :edit
    12	      create.after :recalculate_order
    13	
    14	      rescue_from Spree::Core::GatewayError, with: :spree_core_gateway_error
    15	
    16	      def perform
    17	        @reimbursement.perform!(created_by: spree_current_user)
    18	        redirect_to location_after_save
    19	      end
    20	
    21	      private
    22	
    23	      def recalculate_order
    24	        @reimbursement.order.recalculate
    25	      end
    26	
    27	      def build_resource
    28	        if params[:build_from_customer_return_id].present?
    29	          customer_return = Spree::CustomerReturn.find(params[:build_from_customer_return_id])
    30	
    31	          Spree::Reimbursement.build_from_customer_return(customer_return)
    32	        else
    33	          super
    34	        end
    35	      end
    36	
    37	      def location_after_save
    38	        if @reimbursement.reimbursed?
    39	          admin_order_reimbursement_path(parent, @reimbursement)
    40	        else
    41	          edit_admin_order_reimbursement_path(parent, @reimbursement)
    42	        end
    43	      end
    44	
    45	      # We don't currently have a real Reimbursement "new" page. And the only
    46	      # built-in way to create reimburesments via Solidus admin is from the
    47	      # customer returns admin page via a button that supplies the
    48	      # "build_from_customer_return" parameter. The "edit" page is not
    49	      # suitable for use here for that reason as well.
    50	      # Perhaps we should add a reimbursement new page of some sort.
    51	      def render_after_create_error
    52	        flash.keep
    53	        redirect_to request.referer || admin_url
    54	      end
    55	
    56	      def load_stock_locations
    57	        @stock_locations = Spree::StockLocation.active
    58	      end

     3	module Spree
     4	  module Admin
     5	    class UsersController < ResourceController
     6	      rescue_from ActiveRecord::DeleteRestrictionError, with: :user_destroy_with_orders_error
     7	
     8	      after_action :sign_in_if_change_own_password, only: :update
     9	
    10	      before_action :load_roles, only: [:index, :edit, :new]

    13	      def index

    16	        end
    17	      end
    18	
    19	      def show
    20	        redirect_to edit_admin_user_path(@user)
    21	      end
    22	
    23	      def create
    24	        @user = Spree.user_class.new(user_params)
    25	        if @user.save
    26	          set_roles
    27	          set_stock_locations
    28	
    29	          flash[:success] = t("spree.created_successfully")
    30	          redirect_to edit_admin_user_url(@user)

    32	          load_roles

    35	          flash.now[:error] = @user.errors.full_messages.join(", ")

    40	      def update

    45	          flash[:success] = t("spree.account_updated")
    46	          redirect_to edit_admin_user_url(@user)
    47	        else
    48	          load_roles

    50	
    51	          flash.now[:error] = @user.errors.full_messages.join(", ")
    52	          render :edit, status: :unprocessable_entity
    53	        end
    54	      end
    55	
    56	      def addresses
    57	        if request.put?
    58	          if @user.update(user_params)
    59	            flash.now[:success] = t("spree.account_updated")
    60	          end
    61	
    62	          render :addresses
    63	        end
    64	      end
    65	
    66	      def orders
    67	        params[:q] ||= {}
    68	        @search = Spree::Order.reverse_chronological.ransack(params[:q].merge(user_id_eq: @user.id))
    69	        @orders = @search.result.page(params[:page]).per(Spree::Config[:admin_products_per_page])
    70	      end
    71	
    72	      def items
    73	        params[:q] ||= {}
    74	
    75	        @search = Spree::Order.includes(
    76	          line_items: {
    77	            variant: [:product, {option_values: :option_type}]
    78	          }
    79	        ).ransack(params[:q].merge(user_id_eq: @user.id))
    80	
    81	        @orders = @search.result.page(params[:page]).per(Spree::Config[:admin_products_per_page])
    82	      end
    83	
    84	      def model_class
    85	        Spree.user_class
    86	      end
    87	
    88	      private
    89	
    90	      def collection
    91	        return @collection if @collection
    92	
    93	        @search = super.ransack(params[:q])
    94	        @collection = @search.result.includes(:spree_roles)
    95	        @collection = @collection.includes(:orders)
    96	        @collection = @collection.page(params[:page]).per(Spree::Config[:admin_products_per_page])
    97	      end
    98	
    99	      def user_params
   100	        attributes = permitted_user_attributes
   101	
   102	        if action_name == "create" || can?(:update_email, @user)
   103	          attributes |= [:email]
   104	        end
   105	
   106	        if can? :manage, Spree::StockLocation
   107	          attributes += [{stock_location_ids: []}]
   108	        end
   109	
   110	        unless can? :update_password, @user
   111	          attributes -= [:password, :password_confirmation]
   112	        end
   113	
   114	        params.require(:user).permit(attributes)
   115	      end
   116	
   117	      # handling raise from Spree::Admin::ResourceController#destroy
   118	      def user_destroy_with_orders_error
   119	        invoke_callbacks(:destroy, :fails)
   120	        render status: :forbidden, plain: t("spree.error_user_destroy_with_orders")
   121	      end
   122	
   123	      def sign_in_if_change_own_password
   124	        if spree_current_user == @user && @user.password.present?
   125	          sign_in(@user, event: :authentication, bypass: true)
   126	        end
   127	      end
   128	
   129	      def load_roles
   130	        @roles = Spree::Role.accessible_by(current_ability)
   131	        if @user
   132	          @user_roles = @user.spree_roles
   133	        end
   134	      end
   135	
   136	      def load_stock_locations
   137	        @stock_locations = Spree::StockLocation.accessible_by(current_ability)
   138	      end
   139	
   140	      def set_roles
   141	        roles_ids = params[:user][:spree_role_ids]
   142	        return unless roles_ids
   143	
   144	        @user.update_spree_roles(
   145	          Spree::Role.where(id: roles_ids),
   146	          ability: current_ability
   147	        )
   148	      end
   149	
   150	      def set_stock_locations
   151	        if user_params[:stock_location_ids]
   152	          @user.stock_locations =
   153	            Spree::StockLocation.accessible_by(current_ability).where(id: user_params[:stock_location_ids])
   154	        end
   155	      end
   156	    end
   157	  end
   158	end

## backend/app/controllers/spree/admin/base_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Admin
     5	    class BaseController < Spree::BaseController
     6	      helper "spree/admin/navigation"
     7	      layout "spree/layouts/admin"
     8	
     9	      before_action :authorize_admin
    10	
    11	      respond_to :html
    12	
    13	      private
    14	
    15	      # Overrides ControllerHelpers::Common
    16	      # We want the admin's locale selection to be different than that on the frontend
    17	      include SetsUserLanguageLocaleKey
    18	
    19	      def action
    20	        params[:action].to_sym
    21	      end
    22	
    23	      def authorize_admin
    24	        record = if respond_to?(:model_class, true) && model_class
    25	          model_class
    26	        else
    27	          controller_name.to_sym
    28	        end
    29	        authorize! :admin, record
    30	        authorize! action, record
    31	      end
    32	
    33	      # Need to generate an API key for a user due to some backend actions
    34	      # requiring authentication to the Spree API
    35	      def generate_admin_api_key
    36	        if (user = spree_current_user) && user.spree_api_key.blank?
    37	          user.generate_spree_api_key!
    38	        end
    39	      end
    40	
    41	      def flash_message_for(object, event_sym)
    42	        resource_desc = object.class.model_name.human
    43	        resource_desc += " \"#{object.name}\"" if object.respond_to?(:name) && object.name.present?
    44	        t(event_sym, resource: resource_desc, scope: "spree")
    45	      end
    46	
    47	      def render_js_for_destroy
    48	        render partial: "/spree/admin/shared/destroy"
    49	      end
    50	
    51	      def config_locale
    52	        Spree::Backend::Config[:locale]
    53	      end
    54	
    55	      def lock_order
    56	        Spree::OrderMutex.with_lock!(@order) { yield }
    57	      rescue Spree::OrderMutex::LockFailed
    58	        flash[:error] = t("spree.order_mutex_admin_error")
    59	        redirect_to order_mutex_redirect_path
    60	      end
    61	
    62	      def order_mutex_redirect_path
    63	        edit_admin_order_path(@order)
    64	      end
    65	
    66	      def resource_not_found(flash_class:, redirect_url:)
    67	        flash[:error] = flash_message_for(flash_class.new, :not_found)
    68	        redirect_to redirect_url
    69	        nil
    70	      end
    71	
    72	      def handle_unauthorized_access
    73	        if unauthorized_redirect
    74	          instance_exec(&unauthorized_redirect)
    75	        else
    76	          Spree::Backend::Config.unauthorized_redirect_handler_class.new(self).call
    77	        end
    78	      end
    79	    end
    80	  end
    81	end

## admin/app/controllers/solidus_admin/orders_controller.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module SolidusAdmin
     4	  class OrdersController < SolidusAdmin::BaseController
     5	    include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::StrongParameters
     6	    include SolidusAdmin::ControllerHelpers::Search
     7	
     8	    search_scope(:completed, default: true) { _1.complete.order(completed_at: :desc) }
     9	    search_scope(:canceled) { _1.canceled.order(completed_at: :desc) }
    10	    search_scope(:returned) { _1.with_state(:returned).order(completed_at: :desc) }
    11	    search_scope(:in_progress) { _1.with_state([:cart] + _1.checkout_step_names).order(id: :desc) }
    12	    search_scope(:all) { _1.order(id: :desc) }
    13	
    14	    def index
    15	      orders = apply_search_to(
    16	        Spree::Order.includes(:line_items),
    17	        param: :q,
    18	        distinct: false
    19	      )
    20	
    21	      set_page_and_extract_portion_from(orders)
    22	
    23	      respond_to do |format|
    24	        format.html { render component("orders/index").new(page: @page) }
    25	      end
    26	    end
    27	
    28	    def new
    29	      order = Spree::Order.create!(
    30	        created_by: current_solidus_admin_user,
    31	        frontend_viewable: false,
    32	        store_id: current_store.try(:id)
    33	      )
    34	
    35	      redirect_to order_url(order), status: :see_other
    36	    end
    37	
    38	    def show
    39	      load_order
    40	
    41	      respond_to do |format|
    42	        format.html { render component("orders/show").new(order: @order) }
    43	      end
    44	    end
    45	
    46	    def update
    47	      load_order
    48	
    49	      @order.assign_attributes(order_params)
    50	      @order.email ||= @order.user.email if @order.user&.changed?
    51	
    52	      if @order.save
    53	        flash[:notice] = t(".success")
    54	      else
    55	        flash[:error] = t(".error")
    56	      end
    57	
    58	      respond_to do |format|
    59	        format.html { redirect_to spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order) }
    60	
    61	        format.turbo_stream { render turbo_stream: '<turbo-stream action="refresh" />' }
    62	      end
    63	    end
    64	
    65	    def edit
    66	      redirect_to action: :show
    67	    end
    68	
    69	    def variants_for
    70	      load_order
    71	
    72	      # We need to eager load active storage attachments when using it
    73	      if Spree::Image.include?(Spree::Image::ActiveStorageAttachment)
    74	        image_includes = {
    75	          attachment_attachment: {blob: {variant_records: {image_attachment: :blob}}}
    76	        }
    77	      end
    78	
    79	      @variants = Spree::Variant
    80	        .where.not(id: @order.line_items.select(:variant_id))
    81	        .order(created_at: :desc, id: :desc)
    82	        .where(product_id: Spree::Product.ransack(params[:q]).result.select(:id))
    83	        .limit(10)
    84	        .eager_load(
    85	          :prices,
    86	          images: image_includes || {},
    87	          option_values: :option_type,
    88	          stock_items: :stock_location
    89	        )
    90	
    91	      respond_to do |format|
    92	        format.html { render component("orders/cart/result").with_collection(@variants, order: @order), layout: false }
    93	      end
    94	    end
    95	
    96	    def customers_for
    97	      load_order
    98	
    99	      @users = Spree.user_class
   100	        .where.not(id: @order.user_id)
   101	        .order(created_at: :desc, id: :desc)
   102	        .ransack(params[:q])
   103	        .result(distinct: true)
   104	        .includes(:default_user_bill_address, :default_user_ship_address)
   105	        .limit(10)
   106	
   107	      respond_to do |format|
   108	        format.html { render component("orders/show/customer_search/result").with_collection(@users, order: @order), layout: false }
   109	      end
   110	    end
   111	
   112	    private
   113	
   114	    def load_order
   115	      @order = Spree::Order.find_by!(number: params[:id])
   116	      authorize! action_name, @order
   117	    end
   118	
   119	    def order_params
   120	      params.require(:order).permit(:user_id, permitted_order_attributes)
   121	    end
   122	  end
   123	end

     4	  class AddressesController < BaseController
     5	    include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::StrongParameters

     7	    before_action :load_order, :load_address

    37	
    38	        respond_to do |format|

## core/lib/spree/core/importer/order.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Core
     5	    module Importer
     6	      class Order
     7	        def self.import(user, params)
     8	          params = params.to_h
     9	          ActiveRecord::Base.transaction do
    10	            ensure_country_id_from_params params[:ship_address_attributes]
    11	            ensure_state_id_from_params params[:ship_address_attributes]
    12	            ensure_country_id_from_params params[:bill_address_attributes]
    13	            ensure_state_id_from_params params[:bill_address_attributes]
    14	
    15	            create_params = params.slice :currency
    16	            order = Spree::Order.create! create_params
    17	            order.store ||= Spree::Store.default
    18	            order.associate_user!(user)
    19	            order.save!
    20	
    21	            shipments_attrs = params.delete(:shipments_attributes)
    22	
    23	            create_line_items_from_params(params.delete(:line_items_attributes), order)
    24	            create_shipments_from_params(shipments_attrs, order)
    25	            create_adjustments_from_params(params.delete(:adjustments_attributes), order)
    26	            create_payments_from_params(params.delete(:payments_attributes), order)
    27	
    28	            params.delete(:user_id) unless user.try(:has_spree_role?, "admin") && params.key?(:user_id)
    29	
    30	            completed_at = params.delete(:completed_at)
    31	
    32	            order.update!(params)
    33	
    34	            order.create_proposed_shipments unless shipments_attrs.present?
    35	
    36	            if completed_at
    37	              order.completed_at = completed_at
    38	              order.state = "complete"
    39	              order.save!
    40	            end
    41	
    42	            # Really ensure that the order totals & states are correct
    43	            order.recalculate
    44	            if shipments_attrs.present?
    45	              order.shipments.each_with_index do |shipment, index|
    46	                shipment.update_columns(cost: shipments_attrs[index][:cost].to_f) if shipments_attrs[index][:cost].present?
    47	              end
    48	            end
    49	            order.reload
    50	          end
    51	        end
    52	
    53	        def self.create_shipments_from_params(shipments_hash, order)
    54	          return [] unless shipments_hash
    55	
    56	          shipments_hash.each do |target|
    57	            shipment = Shipment.new
    58	            shipment.tracking = target[:tracking]
    59	            shipment.stock_location = Spree::StockLocation.find_by(id: target[:stock_location_id]) ||
    60	              Spree::StockLocation.find_by(admin_name: target[:stock_location]) ||
    61	              Spree::StockLocation.find_by!(name: target[:stock_location])
    62	
    63	            inventory_units = target[:inventory_units] || []
    64	            inventory_units.each do |inventory_unit|
    65	              ensure_variant_id_from_params(inventory_unit)
    66	
    67	              unless (line_item = order.line_items.find_by(variant_id: inventory_unit[:variant_id]))
    68	                line_item = order.contents.add(Spree::Variant.find(inventory_unit[:variant_id]), 1)
    69	              end
    70	
    71	              # Spree expects a Inventory Unit to always reference a line
    72	              # item and variant otherwise users might get exceptions when
    73	              # trying to view these units. Note the Importer might not be
    74	              # able to find the line item if line_item.variant_id |= iu.variant_id
    75	              shipment.inventory_units.new(
    76	                variant_id: inventory_unit[:variant_id],
    77	                line_item:
    78	              )
    79	            end
    80	
    81	            # Mark shipped if it should be.
    82	            if target[:shipped_at].present?
    83	              shipment.shipped_at = target[:shipped_at]
    84	              shipment.state = "shipped"
    85	              shipment.inventory_units.each do |unit|
    86	                unit.state = "shipped"
    87	              end
    88	            end
    89	
    90	            order.shipments << shipment
    91	            shipment.save!
    92	
    93	            shipping_method = Spree::ShippingMethod.find_by(name: target[:shipping_method]) || Spree::ShippingMethod.find_by!(admin_name: target[:shipping_method])
    94	            rate = shipment.shipping_rates.create!(shipping_method:,
    95	              cost: target[:cost])
    96	            shipment.selected_shipping_rate_id = rate.id
    97	            shipment.update_amounts
    98	          end
    99	        end
   100	
   101	        def self.create_line_items_from_params(line_items_hash, order)
   102	          return {} unless line_items_hash
   103	
   104	          case line_items_hash
   105	          when Hash
   106	            line_items_hash.each_key do |key|
   107	              create_line_item(line_items_hash[key], order)
   108	            end
   109	          when Array
   110	            line_items_hash.each do |line_item_hash|
   111	              create_line_item(line_item_hash, order)
   112	            end
   113	          end
   114	        end
   115	
   116	        def self.create_line_item(line_item_hash, order)
   117	          extra_params = line_item_hash.except(:variant_id, :quantity, :sku)
   118	          line_item = ensure_variant_id_from_params(line_item_hash)
   119	          line_item = order.contents.add(Spree::Variant.find(line_item[:variant_id]), line_item[:quantity])
   120	          # Raise any errors with saving to prevent import succeeding with line items failing silently.
   121	          if extra_params.present?
   122	            line_item.update!(extra_params)
   123	          else
   124	            line_item.save!
   125	          end
   126	        end
   127	
   128	        def self.create_adjustments_from_params(adjustments, order)
   129	          return [] unless adjustments
   130	          adjustments.each do |target|
   131	            adjustment = order.adjustments.build(
   132	              order:,
   133	              amount: target[:amount].to_d,
   134	              label: target[:label]
   135	            )
   136	            adjustment.save!
   137	            adjustment.finalize!
   138	          end
   139	        end
   140	
   141	        def self.create_payments_from_params(payments_hash, order)
   142	          return [] unless payments_hash
   143	          payments_hash.each do |target|
   144	            payment = order.payments.build(order:)
   145	            payment.amount = target[:amount].to_f
   146	            # Order API should be using state as that's the normal payment field.
   147	            # spree_wombat serializes payment state as status so imported orders should fall back to status field.
   148	            payment.state = target[:state] || target[:status] || "completed"
   149	            payment.payment_method = Spree::PaymentMethod.find_by!(name: target[:payment_method])
   150	            source_attributes = target[:source] || target[:source_attributes]
   151	            payment.source = create_source_payment_from_params(source_attributes, payment) if source_attributes
   152	            payment.save!
   153	          end
   154	        end
   155	
   156	        def self.create_source_payment_from_params(source_hash, payment)
   157	          Spree::CreditCard.create(
   158	            month: source_hash[:month],
   159	            year: source_hash[:year],
   160	            cc_type: source_hash[:cc_type],
   161	            last_digits: source_hash[:last_digits],
   162	            name: source_hash[:name],
   163	            payment_method: payment.payment_method,
   164	            gateway_customer_profile_id: source_hash[:gateway_customer_profile_id],
   165	            gateway_payment_profile_id: source_hash[:gateway_payment_profile_id],
   166	            imported: true
   167	          )
   168	        end
   169	
   170	        def self.ensure_variant_id_from_params(hash)
   171	          sku = hash.delete(:sku)
   172	          unless hash[:variant_id].present?
   173	            hash[:variant_id] = Spree::Variant.with_prices.find_by!(sku:).id
   174	          end
   175	          hash
   176	        end
   177	
   178	        def self.ensure_country_id_from_params(address)
   179	          return if address.nil? || address[:country_id].present? || address[:country].nil?
   180	
   181	          search = {}
   182	          if (name = address[:country]["name"])
   183	            search[:name] = name
   184	          elsif (iso_name = address[:country]["iso_name"])
   185	            search[:iso_name] = iso_name.upcase
   186	          elsif (iso = address[:country]["iso"])
   187	            search[:iso] = iso.upcase
   188	          elsif (iso_three = address[:country]["iso3"])
   189	            search[:iso3] = iso_three.upcase
   190	          end
   191	
   192	          address.delete(:country)
   193	          address[:country_id] = Spree::Country.where(search).first!.id
   194	        end
   195	
   196	        def self.ensure_state_id_from_params(address)
   197	          return if address.nil? || address[:state_id].present? || address[:state].nil?
   198	
   199	          search = {}
   200	          if (name = address[:state]["name"])
   201	            search[:name] = name
   202	          elsif (abbr = address[:state]["abbr"])
   203	            search[:abbr] = abbr.upcase
   204	          end
   205	
   206	          address.delete(:state)
   207	          search[:country_id] = address[:country_id]
   208	
   209	          if (state = Spree::State.where(search).first)
   210	            address[:state_id] = state.id
   211	          else
   212	            address[:state_name] = search[:name] || search[:abbr]
   213	          end
   214	        end
   215	      end
   216	    end
   217	  end
   218	end

   108	            payment_type { :credit_card_payment }
   109	          end
   110	
   111	          after(:create) do |order, evaluator|
   112	            create(evaluator.payment_type, amount: order.total, order:, state: "completed")
   113	            order.shipments.each do |shipment|
   114	              shipment.update_column("state", "ready")
   115	            end
   116	            order.reload
   117	          end
   118	
   119	          factory :shipped_order do
   120	            transient do
   121	              with_cartons { true }
   122	            end
   123	            after(:create) do |order, evaluator|
   124	              order.shipments.each do |shipment|
   125	                shipment.inventory_units.update_all state: "shipped"
   126	                shipment.update_columns(state: "shipped", shipped_at: Time.current)
   127	                next unless evaluator.with_cartons
   128	                Spree::Carton.create!(
   129	                  stock_location: shipment.stock_location,
   130	                  address: order.ship_address,
   131	                  shipping_method: shipment.shipping_method,
   132	                  inventory_units: shipment.inventory_units,
   133	                  shipped_at: Time.current
   134	                )
   135	              end
   136	              # We need to update the shipment_state after all callbacks have run
   137	              order.update_columns(shipment_state: "shipped")
   138	              order.reload
   139	            end
   140	          end
   141	        end
   142	      end
   143	    end
   144	  end
   145	end

## sample/db/samples/reimbursements.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	Spree::Sample.load_sample("orders")
     4	
     5	order = Spree::Order.last
     6	inventory_unit = order.inventory_units.take!
     7	stock_location = inventory_unit.find_stock_item.stock_location
     8	return_reason = Spree::ReturnReason.active.take!
     9	preferred_reimbursement_type = Spree::ReimbursementType.where(name: "Original").take!
    10	admin_user = if defined?(Spree::Auth)
    11	  Spree.user_class.admin.take!
    12	else
    13	  Spree.user_class.find_or_create_by!(email: "admin@example.com")
    14	end
    15	
    16	# Mark the order paid and shipped
    17	order.payments.pending.each(&:complete)
    18	order.shipments.each do |shipment|
    19	  shipment.suppress_mailer = false
    20	  shipment.ship!
    21	end
    22	
    23	# Create a return authorization
    24	return_item = Spree::ReturnItem.new(
    25	  inventory_unit:,
    26	  preferred_reimbursement_type:
    27	)
    28	
    29	order.return_authorizations.create!(
    30	  reason: return_reason,
    31	  return_items: [return_item],
    32	  stock_location:
    33	)
    34	
    35	# Create a customer return and mark it as received
    36	customer_return = Spree::CustomerReturn.create!(
    37	  return_items: [return_item],
    38	  stock_location:
    39	)
    40	return_item.reload
    41	return_item.receive!
    42	customer_return.process_return!
    43	
    44	# Accept the customer return and reimburse it
    45	reimbursement = Spree::Reimbursement.build_from_customer_return(customer_return)
    46	reimbursement.return_all(created_by: admin_user)

1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module SolidusPromotions
     4	  module OrderPatch
     5	    module ClassMethods
     6	      def allowed_ransackable_associations
     7	        super + ["solidus_promotions", "solidus_order_promotions"]
     8	      end
     9	    end
    10	
    11	    def self.prepended(base)
    12	      base.has_many :solidus_order_promotions,
    13	        class_name: "SolidusPromotions::OrderPromotion",
    14	        dependent: :destroy,
    15	        inverse_of: :order
    16	      base.has_many :solidus_promotions, through: :solidus_order_promotions, source: :promotion
    17	    end
    18	
    19	    def discountable_item_total
    20	      line_items.sum(&:discountable_amount)
    21	    end
    22	
    23	    def reset_current_discounts
    24	      line_items.each(&:reset_current_discounts)
    25	      shipments.each(&:reset_current_discounts)
    26	    end
    27	
    28	    # This helper method excludes line items that are managed by an order benefit for the benefit
    29	    # of calculators and benefits that discount normal line items. Line items that are managed by an
    30	    # order benefits handle their discounts themselves.
    31	    def discountable_line_items
    32	      line_items.reject(&:managed_by_order_benefit)
    33	    end
    34	
    35	    def free_from_order_benefit?(line_item, _options)
    36	      !line_item.managed_by_order_benefit
    37	    end
    38	
    39	    def coupon_code=(code)
    40	      @coupon_code = begin
    41	        SolidusPromotions.config.coupon_code_normalizer_class.call(code)
    42	      rescue
    43	        nil
    44	      end
    45	    end
    46	
    47	    Spree::Order.singleton_class.prepend self::ClassMethods
    48	    Spree::Order.prepend self
    49	  end
    50	end

     4	  module OrderUpdaterPatch
     5	    # This is only needed for stores upgrading from the legacy promotion system.
     6	    # Once we've removed support for the legacy promotion system, we can remove this.
     7	    def recalculate
     8	      if SolidusPromotions.config.sync_order_promotions
     9	        MigrationSupport::OrderPromotionSyncer.new(order: order).call
    10	      end
    11	      super
    12	    end
    13	
    14	    Spree::OrderUpdater.prepend self

     3	module SolidusPromotions
     4	  module InMemoryOrderUpdaterPatch
     5	    # This is only needed for stores upgrading from the legacy promotion system.
     6	    # Once we've removed support for the legacy promotion system, we can remove this.
     7	    def recalculate(persist: true)
     8	      if SolidusPromotions.config.sync_order_promotions
     9	        MigrationSupport::OrderPromotionSyncer.new(order: order).call
    10	      end
    11	      super
    12	    end
    13	
    14	    Spree::InMemoryOrderUpdater.prepend self
    15	  end
    16	end
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module SolidusPromotions
     4	  class LoadPromotions
     5	    def initialize(order:, dry_run_promotion: nil)
     6	      if dry_run_promotion
     7	        Spree.deprecator.warn <<~MSG
     8	          Passing `dry_run_promotion` to `SolidusPromotions::LoadPromotions` is deprecated.
     9	          Use `Spree::Config.promotions.eligibility_checker_class.new(order: order, promotion: promotion).call` instead.
    10	        MSG
    11	      end
    12	      @order = order
    13	      @dry_run_promotion = dry_run_promotion
    14	    end
    15	
    16	    def call
    17	      promos = connected_order_promotions | sale_promotions
    18	      promos << dry_run_promotion if dry_run_promotion
    19	      promos.flat_map(&:benefits).group_by(&:preload_relations).each do |benefit_preload_relations, benefits|
    20	        preload(records: benefits, associations: benefit_preload_relations)
    21	        benefits.flat_map(&:conditions).group_by(&:preload_relations).each do |condition_preload_relations, conditions|
    22	          preload(records: conditions, associations: condition_preload_relations)
    23	        end
    24	      end
    25	      promos.reject { |promotion| promotion.usage_limit_exceeded?(excluded_orders: [order]) }
    26	    end
    27	
    28	    private
    29	
    30	    attr_reader :order, :dry_run_promotion
    31	
    32	    def preload(records:, associations:)
    33	      ActiveRecord::Associations::Preloader.new(records: records, associations: associations).call
    34	    end
    35	
    36	    def connected_order_promotions
    37	      eligible_connected_promotion_ids = order.solidus_order_promotions.select do |order_promotion|
    38	        order_promotion.promotion.kept? && (order_promotion.promotion_code.nil? || !order_promotion.promotion_code.usage_limit_exceeded?(excluded_orders: [order]))
    39	      end.map(&:promotion_id)
    40	      order.solidus_promotions.active(reference_time).where(id: eligible_connected_promotion_ids).includes(promotion_includes)
    41	    end
    42	
    43	    def sale_promotions
    44	      SolidusPromotions::Promotion.kept.where(apply_automatically: true).active(reference_time).includes(promotion_includes)
    45	    end
    46	
    47	    def reference_time
    48	      order.completed_at || Time.current
    49	    end
    50	
    51	    def promotion_includes
    52	      {
    53	        benefits: :conditions
    54	      }
    55	    end
    56	  end
    57	end

     3	module SolidusPromotions
     4	  # Clears promotions from an emptied order
     5	  class OrderPromotionSubscriber
     6	    include Omnes::Subscriber
     7	
     8	    handle :order_emptied,
     9	      with: :clear_order_promotions,
    10	      id: :solidus_promotions_order_promotion_clear_order_promotions
    11	
    12	    # Clears all promotions from the order
    13	    #
    14	    # @param event [Omnes::UnstructuredEvent]
    15	    def clear_order_promotions(event)
    16	      order = event[:order]
    17	      order.solidus_order_promotions.destroy_all
    18	    end
    19	  end
    20	end

content.text: 1 Summary 2 ------ 3 Solidus Core provides the essential e-commerce data models upon which the 4 Solidus system depends. 5 6 Core models 7 ----------- 8 Solidus implements over 200 [models](https://github.com/solidusio/solidus/tree/main/core/app/models/spree), 9 and thus a deep inspection of each in this README would be overkill. Instead, 10 let's take a quick look at the fundamental models upon which all else depend. 11 Currently, these models remain in the Spree namespace as part of the legacy of 12 [forking Spree](https://solidus.io/blog/2015/10/28/future-of-spree.html). 13 14 ## NOTE: Documentation is a work in progress 15 The documentation of Solidus Core is still in progress. Contributions following 16 this form are welcome and encouraged! 17 18 * [Order sub-system](#order-sub-system) 19 * [User sub-system](#user-sub-system) 20 * [Payment sub-system](#payment-sub-system) 21 * [Inventory sub-system](#inventory-sub-system) 22 * [Shipments sub-system](#shipments-sub-system) 23 24 ## Order sub-system 25 * `Spree::Store` - Records store specific configuration such as store name and URL. 26 * `Spree::Order` - The customers cart until completed, then acts as 27 permanent record of the transaction. 28 * `Spree::LineItem` - Variants placed in the order at a particular price. 29 30 ## User sub-system 31 * `Spree::LegacyUser` - Default implementation of User. 32 * `Spree::UserClassHandle` - Configuration point for User model implementation. 33 * [solidus_auth_devise](https://github.com/solidusio/solidus_auth_devise) - 34 An official, more robust implementation of a User class with Devise 35 integration. 36 37 ## Payment sub-system 38 * `Spree::Payment` - Manage and process a payment for an order, from a specific 39 source (e.g. `Spree::CreditCard`) using a specific payment method (e.g 40 `Solidus::Gateway::Braintree`). 41 * `Spree::PaymentMethod` - A base class which is used for implementing payment methods. 42 * `Spree::PaymentMethod::CreditCard` - An implementation of a `Spree::PaymentMethod` for credit card payments. 43 * `Spree::CreditCard` - The `source` of a `Spree::Payment` using `Spree::PaymentMethod::CreditCard` as payment method. 44 45 ## Inventory sub-system 46 * `Spree::ReturnAuthorization` - Models the return of Inventory Units to 47 a Stock Location for an Order. 48 * `Spree::StockLocation` - Records the name and addresses from which stock items 49 are fulfilled in cartons. 50 * `Spree::InventoryUnit` - Tracks the state of line items' fulfillment. 51 * `Spree::ShippingRate` - Records the costs of different shipping methods for a 52 shipment and which method has been selected to deliver the shipment. 53 * `Spree::ShippingMethod` - Represents a means of having a shipment delivered, 54 such as FedEx or UPS. 55 56 ## Shipments sub-system 57 * `Spree::Shipment` - An order's planned shipments including 58 tracking and cost. Shipments are fulfilled from Stock Locations. 59 60 Developer notes 1 2 3 # Solidus 4 5 [![Test](https://github.com/solidusio/solidus/actions/workflows/test.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/solidusio/solidus/actions/workflows/test.yml) 6 [![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/solidusio/solidus/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/solidusio/solidus/branch/main) 7 [![Gem](https://img.shields.io/gem/v/solidus.svg)](https://rubygems.org/gems/solidus) 8 [![License](http://img.shields.io/badge/license-BSD-blue.svg)](LICENSE.md) 9 10 [![Supporters on Open Collective](https://opencollective.com/solidus/tiers/supporter/badge.svg?label=Supporters&color=brightgree)](https://opencollective.com/solidus) 11 [![Bronze Partners on Open Collective](https://opencollective.com/solidus/tiers/bronze/badge.svg?label=Bronze Partners&color=brightgree)](https://opencollective.com/solidus) 12 [![Silver Partners on Open Collective](https://opencollective.com/solidus/tiers/silver/badge.svg?label=Silver Partners&color=brightgree)](https://opencollective.com/solidus) 13 [![Gold Partners on Open Collective](https://opencollective.com/solidus/tiers/gold/badge.svg?label=Gold Partners&color=brightgree)](https://opencollective.com/solidus) 14 [![Open Source Helpers](https://www.codetriage.com/solidusio/solidus/badges/users.svg)](https://www.codetriage.com/solidusio/solidus) 15 [![Slack](https://shields.io/badge/slack-start_chatting-blue?logo=slack)](http://slack.solidus.io) 16 17 **A free, open-source e-commerce platform that gives you complete control over your store.** 18 19 - **Visit our website**: [https://solidus.io/](https://solidus.io/) 20 - **Read our Community Guidelines**: [https://guides.solidus.io/policies/community-guidelines/](https://guides.solidus.io/policies/community-guidelines/) 21 - **View the project roadmap**: [https://github.com/orgs/solidusio/projects/7](https://github.com/orgs/solidusio/projects/7) 22 - **Read our guides**: [https://guides.solidus.io/](https://guides.solidus.io/) 23 - **Join our Slack**: [http://slack.solidus.io/](http://slack.solidus.io/) 24 - **Solidus Security**: [mailing list](https://groups.google.com/forum/#!forum/solidus-security) 25 26 ## Table of Contents 27 - [Supporting Solidus](#supporting-solidus) 28 - [Summary](#summary) 29 - [Demo](#demo) 30 - [Getting Started](#getting-started) 31 - [Installation Options](#installation-options) 32 - [Performance](#performance) 33 - [Developing Solidus](#developing-solidus) 34 - [Contributing](#contributing) 35 36 ## Supporting Solidus 37 As a community-driven project, Solidus relies on funds and time donated by developers and stakeholders who use Solidus for their businesses. If you'd like to help Solidus keep growing, please consider: 38 39 - [Become a backer or sponsor on Open Collective](https://opencollective.com/solidus). 40 - [Contribute to the project](https://github.com/solidusio/.github/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md). 41 42 ### Main Contributor & Director 43 At present, Nebulab is the main code contributor and director of Solidus, providing technical guidance and coordinating community efforts and activities. 44 45 [![Nebulab](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solidusio/brand/master/partners/Nebulab/logo-dark-light.svg)](https://nebulab.com/) 46 47 ### Ambassadors 48 Support this project by becoming a Solidus Ambassador. Your logo will show up here with a link to your website. [Become an Ambassador](https://opencollective.com/solidus). 49 50 [![Super Good Software](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solidusio/brand/master/partners/SuperGood/logo-dark-light.png)](https://supergood.software/) 51 52 --- 53 54 ## Summary 55 56 Solidus is a complete open source e-commerce solution built with Ruby on Rails. 57 It is a fork of [Spree](https://spreecommerce.org). 58 59 See the [Solidus class documentation](http://docs.solidus.io) and the [Solidus 60 Guides](https://guides.solidus.io) for information about the functionality that 61 Solidus provides. 62 63 Solidus consists of several gems. When you require the `solidus` gem in your 64 `Gemfile`, Bundler will install all of the following gems: 65 66 - [`solidus_api`](https://github.com/solidusio/solidus/tree/master/api) (RESTful API) 67 - [`solidus_backend`](https://github.com/solidusio/solidus/tree/master/backend) (Admin area) 68 - [`solidus_core`](https://github.com/solidusio/solidus/tree/master/core) (Essential models, mailers, and classes) 69 - [`solidus_sample`](https://github.com/solidusio/solidus/tree/master/sample) (Sample data) 70 71 All of the gems are designed to work together to provide a fully functional 72 e-commerce platform. However, you may only want to use the 73 [`solidus_core`](https://github.com/solidusio/solidus/tree/master/core) gem 74 combine it with your own custom frontend, admin interface, and API. 75 76 ## Demo 77 78 You can try the live Solidus demo [here.](http://demo.solidus.io/) The admin section can be accessed [here.](http://demo.solidus.io/admin) 79 80 ## Getting started 1 # frozen_string_literal: true 2 3 require_relative "core/lib/spree/core/version" 4 5 Gem::Specification.new do |s| 6 s.platform = Gem::Platform::RUBY 7 s.name = "solidus" 8 s.version = Spree.solidus_version 9 s.summary = "Full-stack e-commerce framework for Ruby on Rails." 10 s.description = "Solidus is an open source e-commerce framework for Ruby on Rails." 11 12 s.author = "Solidus Team" 13 s.email = "contact@solidus.io" 14 s.homepage = "http://solidus.io" 15 s.license = "BSD-3-Clause" 16 17 s.metadata["rubygems_mfa_required"] = "true" 18 s.metadata["homepage_uri"] = s.homepage 19 s.metadata["source_code_uri"] = "https://github.com/solidusio/solidus" 20 s.metadata["changelog_uri"] = "https://github.com/solidusio/solidus/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md" 21 22 s.files = Dir["README.md", "lib/**/*"] 23 24 s.required_ruby_version = ">= 3.2.0" 25 s.required_rubygems_version = ">= 1.8.23" 26 27 s.add_dependency "solidus_api", s.version 28 s.add_dependency "solidus_backend", s.version 29 s.add_dependency "solidus_core", s.version 30 s.add_dependency "solidus_legacy_promotions", s.version 31 s.add_dependency "solidus_sample", s.version 32 end
